title: Operations Coordinator – Accommodation & Hospitality (Remote)
description:
Sunday to Thursday 9:00 am - 5.30 pm (Australian Eastern Standard Time) with a 30-minute break.





Corporate Keys Group is an established accommodation provider specialising in fully furnished, self-contained apartments and boutique hotel stays throughout Melbourne.



As part of our growth strategy, we are seeking a reliable and highly organised Operations Coordinator to support day-to-day operations across housekeeping, maintenance, guest arrivals, and property administration.



This role suits someone who enjoys coordination, problem-solving, and keeping multiple moving parts running smoothly.





Key Responsibilities



*Manage planning calendars and scheduling to ensure efficient property turnaround

*Coordinate housekeeping cleans and resets with external contractors, and follow up on incomplete or unassigned tasks

*Schedule guest check-ins, item drop-offs, car park inductions, and departures

*Coordinate maintenance requests, tickets, and scheduling across multiple systems

*Liaise with trades, agents, owners, and guests regarding maintenance and access

*Manage keys, lock changes, and compliance checks (smoke, gas, electricity)

*Schedule inspections, removalists, photo shoots, and property showcases

*Monitor tickets, chats, and incoming phone calls and assist in resolution





About You



*Experience in hospitality, accommodation, property, or facilities coordination

*Strong organisational and scheduling skills

*Confident communicator with contractors, guests, and stakeholders

*Able to work independently in a remote role

*Comfortable managing multiple systems and priorities



Why Work with Corporate Keys



*Fully remote position

*Stable hours (Sunday–Thursday)

*Long-term role within an established accommodation business

*Supportive operations team and structured processes

*Join a company with over 15 staff already working from home in the Philippines across IT, Finance, Sales and Guest Services.

*Annual Leave 12 days (Starts to accrue after initial 6-month probation)

*Sick Leave 6 days (Starts to accrue after initial 6-month probation)

*Ability to cash out any accrued annual leave on the 30th June each year.

*12-month performance and contract rate reviews.



Before applying, we need you to add this info to your cover letter; not doing this will mean not being considered. 



*How much notice do you need to provide?

*What is your expected salary in PHP per month?

*Briefly outline your property or hospitality experience, including the type of properties managed and the approximate number of rooms or apartments you were responsible for

*How many years of experience in property management or as a duty manager?

title: Social Media Manager with the right feeling
description:
Finding the right social media manager is difficult.

Someone who will use all our knowledge and experience of our program and our target audience and combine them with their experience and talent.



Plenty of people respond to my ads, but it’s hard to find that one right person. That person with the right skills, the right insights, and the right feeling for what we do.



Social media is a complex discipline. You learn this by understanding the specific market and target audience, by working with results and numbers, and by analyzing what worked and what didn’t. To start all over again tomorrow, because the algorithms have changed.



A feeling for what we are doing is important. Also talent in authentic writing, talent to make visuals that stand out, a good feeling for the different platforms, the ability to see what to post, when and where, and to monitor the results of your posts. This is where a certain talent comes in.



We are looking for a social media manager who fits this description.

The position is for 20 hours a week, including some tasks on weekends.

You can work from home and mostly plan your own working hours.



About us:

Arcticterns.global is a non profit foundation that creates gatherings for traveling families to build community they often miss because of their lifestyle. We host month long programs in different countries, where families come together, connect, learn, and grow. Community is at the heart of everything we do.



Interested?

- Please send a cover letter in which you explain why you are interested and the skills that make you a strong fit for this role. Please make sure your authentic writing skills show in the cover letter and do not use AI.

- Please include samples of your work that touch the above description

- Please complete the IQ test and the DISC test this platform offers.

- Please include your salary range in PHP for the 20 hour job

title: eCommerce Growth Executive
description:
Own Category Growth, Optimize Performance, and Expand Market Dominance.



Hadley Designs is seeking a Growth Executive to take full ownership of a multi-million dollar product category, with Amazon as the primary growth channel. This is a high-impact role for a results-driven e-commerce operator who thrives on ownership, accountability, and driving measurable growth through disciplined execution and data-backed decision-making.



While this role operates deeply within Amazon, we welcome candidates who have driven growth across e-commerce, DTC, or marketplace environments and are excited to apply that experience within a scaled Amazon ecosystem.



How You’ll Win at Hadley Designs:

We believe performance comes from strong systems executed consistently.



Every eCommerce Growth Executive is expected to progress through three stages:



- Learn the Playbook – Understand our category strategy, operating standards, and decision frameworks

- Apply the Playbook – Execute accurately and consistently to deliver predictable, scalable results

- Enhance the Playbook – Improve systems with new ideas and strategies after mastery is demonstrated



This order matters. We value innovation, but only when it is grounded in proven execution. Our playbook exists to help high performers win faster, create leverage, and scale impact — not slow them down.



To formally apply, apply HERE:

title: Shopify & WordPress Virtual Assistant (E-commerce, Data Management, Design & Marketing)
description:
Job Description



We are looking for a detail-oriented and self-driven Virtual Assistant with strong experience in Shopify and WordPress, solid technical skills for managing large data sets, and a working understanding of SEO fundamentals for website management.

Many of the projects we work on are related to music, live events, and show production, so familiarity with this world is a plus and helps with communication and understanding day-to-day tasks.



This role supports online stores and websites through product creation, inventory management, store configuration, SEO maintenance, and ongoing updates. We work in an independent environment where each tea
mber takes ownership of their responsibilities and clearly communicates progress and results.



This position will start part-time, with the possibility of becoming full-time over time.

Work Schedule:

Remote role | Night shift aligned with US hours

GMT+8: 10:00 PM – 6:00 AM (schedule consistency is required)



Key Responsibilities

•	Add and update products in Shopify (large product catalogs)

•	Manage products using CSV files and bulk import/export tools (JSON and similar)

•	Organize products, collections, variants, pricing, and images

•	Assist with Shopify theme updates and basic customization

•	Provide WordPress support (content updates, pages, basic plugins)

•	Manage and update data using Excel and spreadsheets

•	Help build and maintain structured spreadsheets for bulk local SEO pages

•	Perform ongoing SEO maintenance and cleanup tasks

title: Part-Time Video Editor for Australian Marketing Agency (Meta Ads & Tradie Content)
description:
About Us



ScaleUp Labz is an Australian marketing agency based in Sydney. We help roofing, construction, HVAC, and home improvement businesses generate exclusive qualified leads through
 and Google Ads.



We are not a generic agency.



Our clients are tradies doing serious revenue numbers. Many of them go from $30K per month to $150K+ per month when campaigns are dialled in. Our creatives need to reflect that level of professionalism and performance.



We run paid ads, manage CRM systems through GoHighLevel, and produce high converting short form content for Meta platforms.



We are now looking for a part-time video editor to help us create high performing ad creatives and social media project content.



- Role Overview



You will be responsible for editing:



•
 and Instagram ad creatives

• Client project highlight videos

• Before and after transformations

• Short form reels (15 to 60 seconds)

• Testimonial style videos

• Performance driven direct response creatives



This is not just basic editing. We need someone who understands how to edit for conversions.



- What You’ll Be Editing



Most of our clients are:



• Roofing companies

• Tree removal companies

• HVAC companies

• Waterproofing and construction businesses



You’ll be turning:



• Raw job site footage

• Drone footage

• Client testimonial clips

• Before and after photos

• Voiceover scripts

• Hook based ad scripts



Into clean, high converting ads that stop the scroll.



- What We’re Looking For



You must:



• Have strong experience editing short form content

• Understand pacing and hooks for paid ads

• Be able to add captions professionally

• Know how to structure videos for retention

• Be comfortable editing 9:16 and 1:1 formats

• Have experience with CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or similar

• Have good English comprehension



Bonus if you:



• Understand direct response marketing

• Have edited ads for service businesses before

• Know basic motion graphics

• Understand Meta ad creative structure



- Performance Expectations



We are a performance driven agency.



Your edits will directly impact:



• Cost per lead

• Conversion rates

• Revenue generated for clients



We test creatives aggressively, so speed and adaptability are important.



You will be working directly with Anthony (Founder) and our internal team.



- Hours & Structure



• Part time

• 10 to 20 hours per week to start

• Opportunity to grow into full time

• Flexible schedule but must meet deadlines



- Pay



Competitive hourly rate based on experience.



Please include your expected hourly rate in your application.



- How To Apply



To be considered, please:



1. Send 3 to 5 examples of video edits you’ve done (ads preferred)

2. Record a short 1 to 2 minute Loom introducing yourself

3. Tell us what makes a good
 ad creative in your opinion

4. Confirm your hourly rate



Applications without video samples will not be reviewed.



If you are hungry, creative, and want to work with an agency scaling serious Australian businesses, we would love to hear from you.



Anthony

Founder

ScaleUp Labz

title: Executive Operating Partner to CEO/Chairman - $1,800-2,200 USD Monthly
description:
International CEO/Chairman (Pakistan-based, global business operations) seeks elite Executive Assistant to function as strategic operating partner.



THIS IS NOT A STANDARD VIRTUAL ASSISTANT ROLE



You will directly support a CEO/Chairman managing international business interests. You operate with significant autonomy, anticipate executive needs, solve problems proactively, and function as an extension of the CEO's strategic capacity.

Global Operations: Multi-timezone coordination, irregular working hours, high-pressure situations

title: Head of Delivery – Web & Marketing (Remote, Leadership Role)
description:
Immediate Start | Remote | 30–40 Hours per Week



We are hiring a Head of Delivery to take full ownership of our web and multi-channel marketing delivery operations in the fast-moving legal industry.



This is a senior leadership role. You will be responsible for protecting delivery quality, client satisfaction, timelines, and team performance — while freeing the founder from day-to-day operational oversight.



This is not a task management role.

This is an ownership role.



Mission of the Role

Own all client delivery across the organisation and ensure projects are delivered on time, on budget, and at the highest quality — while leading and developing our remote delivery team. You will act as the operational shield between clients and the founder.



Key Responsibilities



1. Delivery Ownership

• Full accountability for all web builds and marketing delivery projects

• Ensure timelines, budgets, and quality standards are consistently met

• Proactively identify risks and resolve them before they escalate

• Protect margin by controlling scope and resourcing



2. Client Leadership

• Primary delivery point of contact for clients

• Lead client calls and provide strategic delivery updates

• Manage expectations and handle difficult conversations professionally

• De-escalate issues independently without founder involvement



3. Team Leadership

• Lead and manage:

 • Delivery Manager

 • Project Coordinators

 • Designers, Developers, Media Buyers, Writers

• Run weekly sprint planning and delivery meetings

• Enforce accountability across the team

• Improve delivery standards and processes



4. Operational Systems

• Oversee Agile sprint management and backlog prioritisation

• Forecast team capacity 30–60 days in advance

• Improve onboarding, QA, and reporting processes

• Build documentation and delivery playbooks



5. Reporting & Performance

• Provide weekly delivery dashboard including:

 • Client health

 • Timeline adherence

 • Capacity utilisation

 • Margin visibility

 • Risks & escalations



You own delivery performance.



Required Experience

• 6+ years managing complex web and digital marketing delivery

• Proven experience leading remote, multi-disciplinary teams

• Experience being the primary client-facing delivery lead

• Strong commercial awareness — understands margin, scope control, and resource allocation

• Comfortable pushing back on clients when required



Technical Literacy (Essential)

You must understand how digital systems work under the hood, including:

• Website architecture, CMS, hosting, APIs, integrations

• QA processes, staging vs production environments

• Deployment workflows and troubleshooting

• Paid ads funnels, tracking pixels, CRM workflows

• Multi-channel marketing systems



You do not need to code — but you must understand the mechanics.



Tools

• Asana / Jira / Trello / similar PM systems

• Slack / Zoom

• CRM & marketing automation platforms

• Reporting dashboards



Remote Leadership Requirements

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Confident leading calls with senior stakeholders

• Proven track record leading distributed teams across time zones



Ideal Candidate Profile



You are:

• Calm under pressure

• Highly accountable

• Decisive

• Commercially aware

• Process-driven

• Not afraid to have difficult conversations

• Comfortable taking ownership



You are someone who thrives in responsibility.



Why Join Us

• High-impact, fast-growth environment

• Opportunity to build and lead a delivery division

• Work at the intersection of marketing, technology, and legal sectors.

• Long-term growth and leadership progression



Compensation

• Competitive hourly rate based on experience

• 30–40 hours per week

• Long-term opportunity for leadership expansion



How to Apply



Please send:

• Your CV (PDF format)

• A short note explaining why you are suited for a Head of Delivery role

• (Optional) 1-minute Loom video introducing yourself



Applications that do not follow instructions will not progress.



References

We conduct reference checks for all tea
mbers prior to hiring.

title: Join Us as an Automation All-Rounder – Remote, 3+ Years in GHL
description:
Love building smart workflows—and writing the messages that make them work? Join us as our Automation All-Rounder and help people glide from first touch to happy outcome.



---



Job Title: Automation All-Rounder

Terms: Part-Time, Remote (10 AM to 2 PM GMT or variable)

Salary/Rate: $10-15USD per hour (based on experience)

Client Location: United Kingdom



---



About the Role



We’re hiring a hands-on Automation All-Rounder who can both build workflows and write the message copy that powers them. You’ll create and maintain automations, fix issues fast, and craft clear, on-brand messages for
/SMS/chat so contacts move through each step smoothly.



You’ll work closely with operations, project managers, and data teams to keep processes efficient, responsive, and measurable.



---



Key Responsibilities



1. Workflow & Automation Build



* Design, implement, and maintain workflows, pipelines, triggers, and integrations.

* Create mini-flows to move people into the correct stage without triggering the wrong messages.

* Connect tools (e.g., CRM ? spreadsheets ? automation platforms) to remove manual steps.



2. Copywriting for Message Flows



* Write concise, user-friendly copy for
s/SMS/in-app messages across the lifecycle (nurture, chasers, re-engagement, confirmations, etc.).

* Produce A/B variants, adapt tone for different audiences, and ensure compliance (opt-out lines, sender IDs, timing).



3. Responsive Troubleshooting



* Act as the go-to person for automation issues that need quick fixes.

* Monitor error queues and tags/fields, diagnose problems, and implement hotfixes with clear documentation.



4. Segmentation, Targeting & Ops



* Set up segments, tags, and custom fields to ensure the right people get the right messages.

* Coordinate handoffs between teams and systems; ensure accurate attribution/UTMs where relevant.



5. QA, Testing & Reporting



* Run end-to-end tests before launch; keep a simple QA checklist.

* Track key results and share clear updates; iterate based on data.



6. Documentation & Enablement



* Document flows (brief diagrams, notes, and Looms).

* Provide quick “how-to” tips so teammates can self-serve simple tasks.



---



Requirements



* Experience: At least 3+ years of hands-on experience with HighLevel (workflows, campaigns, pipelines, forms/calendars, triggers,
/SMS).

* Copywriting: Strong UK-English writing skills; able to craft short, clear, persuasive messages for automation.

* Technical Skills: Comfortable with logic, conditions, and field/tag management; basic webhook/API knowledge is a plus.

* Tools: HighLevel (required). Familiarity with Zapier/Make, Google Sheets/Excel, and analytics dashboards is a plus.

* Communication: Clear written and spoken English; confident on camera for quick Looms.

* Work Hours: 3–4 hours flexible per day, ideally 10 AM–2 PM GMT (Philippines Time: 6 PM–10 PM).

* Tech Requirements: Stable internet, laptop/computer, quiet workspace.



---



What We Offer



* Flexible part-time hours (4 hours/day).

* Competitive pay $10 - 15 USD/hour, based on experience.

* Work with a collaborative international team.

* Room to grow into broader marketing automation responsibilities.



---



How to Apply



Please send your CV and a short note explaining why this role suits you here: 
/4fh71Yt



* Include your CV as a PDF

* Add a covering message explaining why you’re a great fit

* Bonus: a 1–2 minute Loom introducing yourself and a quick overview of an automation you’ve built



***** Please follow these instructions, or your application will not progress *****



---



PLEASE NOTE: REFERENCES

We always take references on every new tea
mber before they join, so only apply if you can provide up to three professional references. No exceptions.

title: NEW: Experienced Ads Manager needed for Ongoing Projects
description:
********** NEW ROLE FOR SEPTEMBER START **********



We are seeking a hero of a Paid Ads Specialist to join our team on a part-time basis. This role is perfect for an experienced digital marketer who thrives in Google Ads, YouTube Ads, and Meta Ads and is looking for flexible hours with the potential for growth.



*** Please do not apply unless you have a minimum of 5 years of continuous and recent experience. ***



You’ll be responsible for managing and optimising ads across two accounts to begin with, ensuring we drive high-quality traffic and conversions. If you have at least five years of experience in performance marketing, are certified (or willing to be with our support), and can work magic in just two hours a day, we want to hear from you!



Responsibilities (2 Hours/Day)

Daily Ad Account Management (1 Hour/Day)

Google Ads (Essential) & YouTube Ads (Important): Optimize campaigns for conversions, adjust bids, manage budgets, and refine targeting strategies.

Meta Ads (Bonus): Oversee ad performance, audience targeting, and campaign adjustments.

A/B Testing: Run experiments on ad creatives, copy, and landing pages to improve conversion rates.

Ensure Campaign Efficiency: Regularly analyse performance metrics and adjust accordingly.



Performance Analysis & Reporting (30 Min/Day)

Monitor KPIs: Track performance metrics (CTR, ROAS, CPC, CPA, etc.).

Data-Driven Recommendations: Provide insights on budget allocation and scaling strategies.

Weekly Mini Report: Summarize key takeaways and action points.

Confident on video calls to answer questions and chat about the ad strategy

title: Experienced Senior Project Manager for Web Development Projects
description:
Senior Project Manager – Web & Marketing Delivery (Remote, Part-Time)



Immediate Start



We are looking for an experienced Senior Project Manager to lead our web development and multi-channel marketing delivery projects in the fast-moving world of class action law. This is a remote, part-time position with strong potential for long-term growth.



Key Responsibilities

	•	End-to-End Project Leadership – Manage web builds and digital marketing delivery projects from discovery to launch, ensuring timelines, budgets, and quality standards are met.

	•	Agile Delivery – Run projects using Agile sprints, managing backlogs, ceremonies, and retrospectives while protecting delivery against scope creep.

	•	Technical Understanding – Be able to discuss the nuts and bolts of web development and marketing delivery, including:

	     •	Website architecture, CMS, hosting, APIs, and integrations

	     •	QA processes, staging vs. production environments, deployment pipelines

	     •	Marketing funnels, tracking pixels, ad platform integrations, and CRM workflows

	•	Multi-Disciplinary Team Management – Lead designers, developers, marketers, and compliance experts across time zones.

	•	Risk & Compliance Management – Anticipate risks, manage scope changes, and ensure projects meet compliance requirements (data handling, claimant onboarding standards).

	•	Client & Stakeholder Communication – Provide clear, proactive updates and manage expectations at every stage.



Requirements

	•	Proven Experience – 5+ years managing complex digital/web projects with multiple stakeholders and moving parts. Experience in legal, regulated, or compliance-heavy environments is a plus.

	•	Agile Expertise – Solid working knowledge of Agile (Scrum/Kanban). Ability to coach teams in Agile practices.

	•	Technical Literacy – Must understand how websites and digital marketing systems work under the hood (not just from a PM perspective). You don’t need to code, but you must know the difference between front-end/back-end tasks, QA issues, API calls, DNS/SSL settings, and how ad/CRM systems integrate.

	•	Tools – Strong proficiency with a PM tool like Asana, Jira, Trello, Basecamp, plus communication tools (Zoom, Slack/Teams).

	•	Excellent English – Fluent in reading, writing, and speaking. Must be comfortable in client-facing roles.

	•	Remote Leadership – Successful track record leading distributed teams and delivering results across multiple time zones.



Nice to Have

	•	Background in legal tech, class action law, or claimant acquisition campaigns.

	•	Familiarity with marketing automation, CRM-driven funnels, and compliance processes (KYC/AML, GDPR).



Why Join Us

	•	Work in a fast-paced, high-impact sector where marketing, technology, and law intersect.

	•	Opportunity to progress within the organisation as we expand globally.

	•	Flexible, remote-first culture with part-time hours and room to grow.



********************

title: Shopify Fashion Product Lister (A player only!)
description: We are a serious Shopify general fashion dropshipping brand looking for a high-level, experienced Product Lister who fully understands product structure, pricing strategy, sizing logic, and market positioning. This is not an entry-level role. If you have only basic listing experience, do not apply. Your responsibility is to professionally list products inside Shopify, structure variants correctly (sizes, colors, options), add and properly format size charts, adjust pricing based on supplier quotations and margins, and ensure all product data is accurate at all times. You must understand international fashion markets and know which sizes are suitable for which countries, how to avoid sizing mistakes, and how to prevent costly listing errors. You will request quotations from suppliers daily, especially for products we are actively selling, monitor cost changes, update prices immediately when supplier pricing changes, and maintain healthy margins. If suppliers update stock, sizes, pricing, or shipping details, you are responsible for reflecting those changes in the store without being reminded. You are expected to think proactively, prevent mistakes before they happen, and maintain strict operational accuracy. Sloppy work, missed details, and slow responses are not acceptable. This is a full-time, long-term role for someone who takes ownership and operates at a high level without supervision. IMPORTANT: To confirm you read this job post carefully, write this word in the first line of your application: ORANGE. Applications without this word will be ignored automatically. Also include your Shopify experience, examples of stores you have worked with, and the exact tasks you handled in those stores. NOTE: I am only hiring an A-player Product Lister with proven high-level experience in fashion dropshipping; if you are not confident in your skills, attention to detail, and decision-making ability, do not apply.

title: AI Tool Researcher
description:
Company: BriarBear

Location: Fully Remote (Philippines)

Schedule: Graveyard Shift (Start time between 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM PH Time)

Salary: $500 USD Monthly

Employment Type: Full-Time



About this Role

We are hiring an AI Tool Researcher to help our company stay at the forefront of the rapidly

evolving AI landscape. This role is equal parts researcher, power user, internal educator, and

productivity optimizer.

Your job is not just to read about AI tools—but to discover them early, test them deeply, and

translate their real-world value into practical use cases for our teams across product,

engineering, video, operations, and leadership.

AI is moving fast. New tools, agents, and workflows appear weekly. This role exists to make

sure we don’t fall behind—and more importantly, that we actually use what’s possible.

You will work closely with leadership on a daily basis and collaborate with teams across the

company to identify where AI can save time, improve quality, or unlock entirely new capabilities.



What You’ll Do

1. Discover New AI Tools & Products

? Actively research and track new AI tools, platforms, and startups across:

? AI chatbots and copilots

? AI agents and automation tools

? AI-powered SaaS products (e.g., research, negotiation, analytics, content,

operations)

? Monitor AI newsletters, communities, and launch platforms (e.g., AI Valley, AI

Breakfast, product launches, demos, social media, and forums).

? Identify tools early—before they become mainstream—and assess their relevance to

our business.

Example:

Discovering tools like new AI chatbots, AI-powered negotiation tools, AI research

assistants, or emerging agent frameworks and flagging them for internal use.

2. Hands-On Testing & Experimentation

? Personally use and test AI tools to understand:

? What they are actually capable of (not just marketing claims)

? Where they break

? What workflows they truly improve



? Explore advanced and creative use cases across areas such as:

? Research and analysis

? Product development and design

? Programming and technical workflows

? Video and content production

? Operations, HR, payroll, and internal processes

? Compare tools against each other and recommend the best option for specific

needs.

This role requires curiosity and experimentation. You are expected to “play,” test,

and push tools to their limits.

3. Internal Knowledge Sharing & Enablement

? Create clear, concise Loom videos, walkthroughs, and internal presentations

explaining:

? What the tool is

? Why it matters

? How we should use it

? Share findings with leadership and relevant teams in a way that is:

? Practical

? Actionable

? Easy to adopt

? Maintain internal documentation or tool libraries as needed.

Your goal is to translate complexity into clarity for the rest of the company.

4. Team Collaboration & Workflow Optimization

? Meet regularly with tea
mbers across:

? Product

? Engineering

? Video / Creative

? Operations

? Leadership

? Understand what each team is doing today and identify:

? Where AI could speed things up

? Where AI could improve quality

? Where AI could enable entirely new workflows

? Recommend specific tools, agents, or processes tailored to each role.



Example:

Helping video editors discover better AI UGC tools, helping engineers explore new

coding or agent-based workflows, or helping operations teams automate spreadsheets

and reporting.

5. AI Agents & Future-Facing Workflows

? Research and experiment with AI agents and multi-step automation.

? Explore how AI agents could be used for:

? Research

? Product iteration

? Operations

? Internal tooling

? Help leadership think strategically about how AI should be embedded into how we

build products and run the company.



Who You Are

? Extremely curious and self-directed

? Comfortable learning new tools constantly

? Excited by experimentation, not intimidated by incomplete documentation

? Able to explain technical or complex concepts in simple terms

? Organized enough to track findings, tools, and recommendations

? Comfortable working closely with leadership

? Strong written and verbal English communication skills



Required Skills & Experience

? Strong interest in AI, automation, and emerging technology

? Experience using modern AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude/Opus, copilots, AI

SaaS tools)

? Ability to research independently and synthesize insights

? Experience creating Loom videos, demos, or internal presentations (or willingness to

learn quickly)

? Comfortable working a graveyard shift aligned with US-based teams



Nice to Have (But Not Required)

? Background in product, research, operations, engineering, or content

? Experience testing beta products or early-stage tools

? Familiarity with AI agents, automation platforms, or no-code tools

? Experience working with distributed or remote teams



Why This Role Matters

This role directly impacts:

? Company productivity

? Product quality

? Speed of execution

? Competitive advantage

AI is no longer optional. The AI Tool Researcher ensures we are not just aware of what’s

happening—but actively leveraging it.

title: Systems Coordinator
description:
Position Overview:  



The Systems Coordinator is responsible for creating, managing, and troubleshooting automation workflows in GoHighLevel (GHL) to support efficient operations across the company. This role requires at least one year of hands-on experience in GHL or a similar automation platform, along with strong analytical and problem-solving skills. In addition to system automation, this person will assist the Admin Operations Team with various ad hoc tasks and continuously seek opportunities to optimize workflows, eliminate inefficiencies, and enhance team productivity. 



 



Pay Range: $8 per hourwith a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents. 



 



About Power Plus Systems: 



Power Plus Systems, LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission. 



 



Objectives: 



Build, maintain, and troubleshoot automation workflows in GoHighLevel to support streamlined operations. 



Monitor performance of active automations to ensure accuracy, functionality, and timely resolution of system issues. 



Work closely with the Operations Manager to understand workflow needs and translate them into effective and efficient automations, while coordinating with Admin Operations and other departments as needed. 



Identify inefficiencies in current processes and proactively recommend workflow improvements. 



Assist the Admin Operations Team with various administrative and operational tasks, ensuring smooth day-to-day operations. 



Troubleshoot and resolve Admin Operations Help Tickets with a customer-service–focused approach. 



Manage and update pipelines, triggers, automations, forms, and integrations as needed. 



Ensure all GHL data, workflows, and configurations are maintained accurately and consistently. 



 



Competencies: 



Strong understanding of automation logic, workflows, and pipeline management. 



High attention to detail to ensure accurate configuration and troubleshooting of automation sequences. 



Excellent problem-solving skills with the ability to identify system gaps and propose solutions. 



Strong written and verbal communication skills to work effectively with cross-functional teams. 



Proficiency in GoHighLevel or similar automation platforms (HubSpot, Zapier, Make, Zoho, ActiveCampaign, etc.). 



Ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously in a fast-paced environment. 



Proactive mindset with a drive for continuous improvement. 



Customer service orientation when supporting internal stakeholders. 



 



Equipment Requirements: 



Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently. 



High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work. 



 



Education and Experience: 



At least one year of hands-on experience with GoHighLevel or similar automation platforms. 



Experience in operations, administrative support, or systems management is a plus. 



Familiarity with CRM logic, automation mapping, or workflow design is strongly preferred. 



 



Physical Requirements: 



Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer. 



 



Benefits: 



Growth opportunities in a well-established company. 



Ongoing training and professional development opportunities. 



Opportunity for advancement within the company. 



A supportive and collaborative work environment. 



Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time). 



Paid vacation. 



 



How to Apply: 



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below. 




/internationalform 



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply. 



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Customer Support Assistance
description:
Customer Service Assistant 
 Support) for Custom Wooden Products



We are Aboutwood, a company selling custom-made wooden products through 
. Since our products are individually made to order, our customers often have questions regarding measurements, orders, processes, delivery times, or custom requests. We are looking for a reliable tea
mber from the Philippines to support us with handling incoming customer
s.



Your main task will be to review incoming customer inquiries and prepare well-structured
 reply drafts. It is important to us that you work carefully, have a good sense for language, and can communicate information in a clear, friendly, and professional way. Ideally, you are organized, detail-oriented, and able to understand customer concerns well.



How the workflow works:



We work with a Customer Service AI Agent that supports you in preparing replies. When a new
 comes in, you review the customer’s message, provide the relevant information to our AI agent, and generate a draft reply. You then carefully review the draft, improve the wording, adjust the content where needed, and give it a final polish. After that, you save the response as a draft in our
 inbox, so our in-house customer service tea
mber can review and send it.



We will use this process during the onboarding phase so you can gradually learn about our products, common customer questions, and internal workflows. The goal is that over time, you become fully familiar with the role and are able to handle customer
s more independently and confidently on your own.



What is important to us:



Very careful and structured way of working



Good understanding of customer communication



Friendly and professional writing style



Reliability and willingness to learn



Confidence in following clear processes and recurring tasks



Openness to working with AI tools



If you have experience in customer service, virtual assistance, or
 support and would like to work with a structured and friendly team, we would love to hear from you.



Looking forward to your message.

title: WordPress Technical Support (Ongoing – Healthcare / Psychology Website)
description:

This is not SEO content writing.

• Improving site speed and performance (mobile + desktop)

• Compressing and optimising images

• Installing and configuring plugins correctly

• Embedding video (YouTube / unlisted / webinar replays)

• Updating and restructuring service pages

• Creating new pages (e.g., associate profiles)

• Ensuring mobile responsiveness

• Light CSS adjustments where needed

• Troubleshooting hosting-related issues

• Backups and security best practice



The site is already live.

• Be confident in WordPress (not just uploading posts)

• Understand form plugins and SMTP configuration

• Understand site speed optimisation

• Be available for quick turnaround when needed

 delivery

Bonus if you have worked with healthcare or therapy practices before.



This will be ongoing work for the right person.

title: Video Editor for Cinematic Product Videos in a German Agency
description:
About Us:



We are a rapidly growing marketing agency from Germany, recognized as a market leader in our field. Our team is young, motivated, and passionate about producing outstanding content. We specialize in creating high-quality product videos for online shops and Amazon product pages. As we continue to expand, we're looking for Remote Video Editors to join our team for a long-term commitment.





Job Description:



We are seeking a talented and experienced Video Editor to cut product videos. You will be provided with all the raw material and a detailed video script for each project. The role is entirely remote, requiring a high-speed internet connection due to the large size of the projects (avg. 100GB) for efficient uploads and downloads.





Training:



To ensure you're set up for success, we provide an extensive course on editing product videos, created by our team. Watching and learning from this course marks the beginning of our collaboration.





Trial Period:



The first week is a paid trial phase, where you'll go through our course and complete a test project. If the quality meets our standards, we will proceed with a permanent employment offer.





Requirements:



Experience in video editing

• Very good in Premiere Pro

• Good in After Effects and Photoshop

• Strong aesthetic sense and design skills

• Good English skills

• Interested in a full-time role (40 hours/week) and looking for long-term employment (years)





How to Apply:



Please submit your application with the subject "Gold-Video-Candidate" and include videos of your previous work.





Traits We Value:



• Ability to follow clear instructions and processes

• Discipline and determination

•. Eagerness to create amazing videos and push the limits





Benefits:



• Paid time off and paid holidays

• 13th-month pay

• Annual performance-based salary bonus/increases

• Internal training with exclusive knowledge





Join Us:



If you're passionate about making a significant impact with your video editing skills and are looking for a long-term, fulfilling career, we'd love to hear from you. Apply today to become a part of our success story!

description:
Help Keep a Fast-Growing eCommerce Business Running Smoothly!

title: Accountant
description:
About the Business



We are an established and growing distribution business supplying retailers across Australia. Our operations are fast-paced, volume-driven and detail-critical. Accuracy, pricing integrity and timely processing are essential to keeping our supply chain running smoothly.



As we continue to expand, we are strengthening our internal finance function and are seeking an experienced Bookkeeper who is organised, switched on and confident managing day-to-day financial operations in a distribution environment.



About the Role



This is a hands-on operational bookkeeping role supporting a busy wholesale and purchasing function. You will be responsible for ensuring transactions are processed accurately, supplier and customer accounts are maintained correctly, and compliance obligations are met without delay.



You must be comfortable working in a fast-paced distribution environment where accuracy, margins and deadlines matter.



Key Responsibilities



Data entry and invoicing



Bank and account reconciliations



Accounts payable and receivable, including credit notes, pricing adjustments and supplier reconciliations



Payroll processing and superannuation submissions



Purchasing administration, including supplier invoice processing and purchase orders



Maintaining and updating pricing within internal systems



Assisting with pricing accuracy, cost updates and margin checks



Maintaining structured financial records and improving internal processes



This role requires someone who can manage competing priorities, take ownership of their workload, and complete tasks accurately without constant supervision.



About You



Minimum 3 years’ bookkeeping experience (preferably in wholesale, distribution or product-based businesses)



Cert IV in Accounting (Advanced Diploma preferred)



Strong working knowledge of NetSuite (essential) and/or Xero



High level of attention to detail and accuracy



Strong organisational and time management skills



Confident handling credit notes, pricing updates and supplier reconciliations



Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Proficient in Microsoft Office, particularly Excel



You are practical, efficient and understand how financial accuracy directly impacts operations, stock and margins in a distribution business.



Why Join Us?



Stable, full-time role



Supportive and professional team environment



Opportunity to contribute to a growing national distribution business



A role where operational accuracy genuinely matters



If you are a reliable, detail-focused bookkeeper who thrives in a structured and fast-moving environment, we would love to hear from you.

title: Link Acquisition & Digital PR Specialist (Remote)
description:
We are Penji (penji.co), an on-demand design service. We don't need low-quality directory links or spammy blog comments. We are looking for a creative, resilient outreach specialist who can get our brand featured on high-authority design, marketing, and business publications.

You will not just be "building links." You will be building relationships and acting as a PR bridge between our content and the rest of the internet.



The Mission

• Hunt High-Value Targets: Identify relevant websites, blogs, and journalists in the design/tech/SaaS space that actually matter.

• Craft "Un-Ignoreable"
s: Write personalized cold outreach
s that get opened and replied to. No copy-paste templates that sound like a bot.

• Leverage Our Design Power: You have a team of professional designers at your disposal. Use them! Pitch infographics, visual stats, and guest posts that look amazing to secure placements.

• Negotiate & Close: Manage the back-and-forth communication to secure the backlink, whether through guest posting, broken link building, or digital PR campaigns.

• Analyze & Report: Track your wins. We care about the Domain Rating (DR) and Traffic of the links you get, not just the total number.



Who You Are

• You are a Sniper, not a Spammer: You’d rather get 3 links from reputable sites (DR 60+) than 50 links from junk sites.

• You speak "Fluent Internet": Your written English is impeccable. You know how to be persuasive without sounding salesy.

• You are Thick-Skinned: You handle rejection well and know that a "No" is just part of the process.

• Tool Proficient: You are an expert in Ahrefs or Semrush. You know how to analyze a competitor’s backlink profile and steal their strategy.



Requirements

• Proven Portfolio: Success in Off-Page SEO with a portfolio of high-DR links you’ve personally secured.

• Technical SEO Mastery: Strong understanding of Google’s Link Quality Guidelines and the ability to differentiate between a real site and a "Link Farm."

• Competitive Strategy: Experience with Backlink Gap Analysis and studying competitor profiles via Ahrefs or Semrush.

• Outreach Expert: Proficiency with tools like Pitchbox, BuzzStream, or 
.

• White Hat Purist: We strictly follow White Hat practices to protect our long-term domain health.

• Quality Control: Ability to evaluate website relevance and "true" authority beyond just a DR score.



How to Apply

To ensure your application stands out:

1. Complete the application form:

2 . Attach your portfolio or relevant work samples.

title: Technical Support Specialist (Open to Fresh Graduates)
description:

We are prioritizing only candidates who are recent graduates of Computer Science or any IT-related degree program. Applicants must already understand the fundamentals of how websites and online platforms operate.



Although this is a junior-level role and training will be provided, applicants are expected to have working knowledge of essential web technologies such as HTML, CSS, and JavaScript before starting.

- Qualifying job posts based on criteria we provide

- Customizing personalized, high-converting messages (with AI) that stand out from generic proposals

- Tracking and reporting on outreach activity and results



Responsibilities

- Send 5-10 quality proposals per day on Upwork (that's at a 1-2 hour daily workload)

- Scan and qualify new Upwork job posts daily based on our qualification criteria (training provided)

- Personalize each proposal to the specific job post - no copy-paste blasts

- Track all outreach activity and responses so nothing falls through the cracks

- Communicate results and learnings with the team on a regular basis



Day To Day

- Review new job posts on Upwork and filter for qualified opportunities

- customize proposals aimed at booking discovery calls

- Follow up on active conversations and warm leads

- Log all activity and flag high-potential opportunities

- Share insights on what's working and what's not — we value people who think, not just execute



Growth Opportunity

- This starts as a 1-2 hour/day role with a clear path to full-time

- As you prove yourself, you'll have the option to take on cold
 outreach campaigns on top of Upwork with additional compensation

- We reward consistency and initiative with more responsibility and compensation



Qualifications

- Exceptional written English - you can write messages that feel human, relevant, and compelling

- Diligently using tools provided (VPN, logins, incognito windoews - a must for account safety)

- Daily reliability and long-term consistency is a NON-NEGOTIABLE — we need someone who shows up every single day

- Experience with Upwork (sending proposals, understanding the platform) is ideal but not required

- Detail-oriented and organized - you don't let leads slip

- Self-starter who can manage their own time in a 1-2 hour daily window

- Understanding of marketing/advertising services is a plus



If you are interested, apply, and I will DM you with the next steps.

title: Amazon PPC Manager
description:
Urgent Hiring: Amazon PPC Manager

Reports To: CEO / Amazon Optimization Manager

Work Hours: Philippines Daytime Work Hours



ONLY APPLICANTS WHO WILL APPLY THROUGH THE LINK WILL BE ENTERTAINED.



Company Vision

We want to work with you to grow our company while helping you to become a superstar in your field. We value problem solvers, go-getters, and people with opinions who want to make an impact. You will be on the leading edge of Amazon and online strategies, continually improving your knowledge in the pursuit of helping us grow our business.



At the same time, you will be working with a company that values community & family—both internally and customer-facing. Our mission is to delight kids & parents with creative craft kits and related products. We are 100% focused on that mission and want you to be there on the ride with us!



That’s where you come in as our next Amazon PPC Manager.



Role Purpose

The Amazon PPC Manager owns the performance of all paid advertising on Amazon across our catalog. This person leads the strategy, execution, and optimization of all Sponsored Product, Sponsored Brand, and Sponsored Display campaigns to drive discoverability, revenue growth, and profitable scaling.



You will leverage Scale Insights daily—using advanced features like automation flows, keyword scoring, search term mining, and campaign-level rule logic—to drive high-impact decisions. Your ability to move beyond manual optimization and harness automation for scale is critical to success in this role.



What Success Looks Like

You consistently drive performance improvements using both manual and automated techniques, with Scale Insights as your core control panel. You own automation flows that intelligently adjust bids, pause underperforming targets, surface search term goldmines, and scale winners. You don’t just use Scale Insights—you master it.



You maintain a proactive and adaptive PPC strategy aligned with the catalog lifecycle, launch timing, and seasonality. Through frequent reporting, experimentation, and coordination with SEO, creative, and ops, you ensure campaigns support profitable, long-term growth.



Primary Objectives

Maximize profitable growth through advanced automation using Scale Insights

Own and optimize campaign architecture to drive ROI across all product stages

Partner cross-functionally for ad-aligned launches, creatives, and keyword strategy

Test, measure, and iterate to continuously improve CTR, CVR, and ROAS



Regular Work Activities

Monitor and refine SP/SB/SD campaigns daily through Scale Insights dashboards

Execute bid adjustments, search term mining, negative pruning

Build and optimize automation rules and flows in Scale Insights

Audit underperforming ad groups and apply automated corrective logic

Set up rule-based triggers for seasonal budget shifts and event-based bidding

Conduct A/B testing for headlines, images, placements

Weekly reporting with commentary using Scale Insights and custom dashboards

Work with SEO to align ad keyword targeting with organic ranking efforts

Collaborate with creative to ensure ad assets match campaign goals

Track budget utilization and reallocate funds based on real-time data

Maintain documentation and SOPs for all Scale Insights workflows

Guide PPC Assistants on implementing and QA’ing automation rules

Troubleshoot disapproved or underperforming ads

Flag inventory and pricing concerns affecting campaign viability

Maintain performance calendars for launches, promos, seasonality



Key Skills

Advanced knowledge of Scale Insights (automation, keyword scoring, flows)

Deep understanding of Amazon Ads (SP, SB, SD)

Strategic and analytical mindset with strong Excel/Google Sheets skills

Mastery in keyword match types, campaign structure, and budget management

Proven record of improving CTR, CVR, and ROAS

Excellent reporting and data storytelling skills

Detail-oriented with strong project tracking ability

Comfortable owning results, fixing issues, and moving fast

Strong communication across SEO, creative, and leadership teams

Passionate about learning and applying new ad techniques



People Contacts and Interactions

SEO Manager: Weekly coordination for keyword and ranking overlap

Creative Team: Weekly/as needed for ad assets, testing needs

Operations: Weekly or ad-hoc for stock, pricing, launch strategy

CEO / Leadership: Weekly/monthly reporting, performance reviews



Role Requirements

3+ years managing Amazon PPC campaigns

Experience using Scale Insights (must demonstrate real automation flow use cases, not just dashboards)

Proven success managing TACoS, ACOS, ROAS in high-SKU environments

Experience launching campaigns for new products and scaling mature ones

High proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets

Familiarity with keyword research, ranking tools, and performance reporting

Experience with automation strategy, not just manual optimization

Self-starter with high personal accountability and ownership

Bonus: Experience in creative ad testing and headline writing



How to Apply:

Click the link - 
/o/JB-7HSMY4Q39/landing

ONLY APPLICANTS WHO WILL APPLY THROUGH THE LINK WILL BE ENTERTAINED.

title: Revyoos Sales Representative (Lead Closer / Outbound Specialist)
description:
Revyoos is hiring a results-driven Sales Representative (Lead Closer / Outbound Specialist) to help us scale fast in the vacation rental and hospitality SaaS market.



This role is built for someone who lives and breathes outbound B2B sales, executes structured multi-channel prospecting sequences, and consistently converts qualified conversations into recurring revenue (MRR).



You will own deals end-to-end, work with clear targets and KPIs, and be a key driver of Revyoos’ next growth phase as we expand internationally.



You will proactively engage vacation rental property managers and small hotel operators, guide them through the consultative sales process, and convert qualified leads into long-term Revyoos customers.



Experience in the vacation rental, short-term rental, property management software (PMS), or hospitality tech space is a strong plus.



---



## Key Responsibilities



### Outbound B2B Sales



Own the outbound motion end-to-end by engaging warm and cold leads via phone,
, LinkedIn, and automated prospecting sequences.



### Lead Management & Follow-Up



Execute disciplined, multi-touch follow-ups to maximize response and meeting rates and ensure no opportunity is missed.



### CRM & Sales Sequences



Use Zoho CRM to manage pipelines, build and optimize sequences, automate follow-ups, and maintain accurate sales data and forecasting.



### Consultative Selling



Understand the challenges vacation rental operators face around reviews, online reputation, direct bookings, and conversion rate. Clearly communicate Revyoos’ value and tailor each conversation to prospect needs.



### Closing & Objection Handling



Handle objections confidently, negotiate pricing, and convert free trials into paying SaaS customers.



### Collaboration & Optimization



Work closely with marketing and leadership to refine ICP targeting, messaging, and outbound performance.



### Sales Metrics



Track pipeline, conversion rates, and MRR generation inside Zoho CRM and continuously optimize outreach strategies.



---



## Requirements



• Proven experience in outbound B2B SaaS sales, lead conversion, and closing

• Strong expertise in outbound prospecting, sequences, and follow-up systems

• Hands-on experience with Zoho CRM or similar CRM platforms

• Ability to manage high-volume outreach independently

• Fluent, professional English (spoken and written)

• Availability overlapping Europe and US Eastern Time

• Excellent communication, persuasion, and negotiation skills

• Highly self-motivated and target-oriented



---



## Preferred



• Experience selling to vacation rentals, property managers, or hospitality operators

• Experience selling SaaS subscriptions or recurring revenue products

• Familiarity with tools such as PMS, channel managers, dynamic pricing tools, or booking engines

• Experience using automation tools to scale outbound prospecting



---



## Compensation



• Fixed base salary

• Commission on every closed deal

• Clear performance targets and growth path

• High earning potential with a proven product

• 50%+ trial-to-paid conversion rate

title: GHL operator-A2P 10DLC Compliance + Funnel Implementation
description:
We are seeking an experienced GoHighLevel to come aboard fulltime or parttime.



First task will be a paid trial. t.



Once the trial task is successfully completed you will come aboard to run our marketing department and grow with our company.



Trial Project Scope:



• Submit one A2P campaign 

• Align website branding with approved A2P brand

• Convert pop-up intake forms to URL-based intake pages

• Build 3 simple intake funnels under one sub-account

• Configure SMS +
 + calendar workflows

• Ensure STOP compliance and Low Volume Mixed safeguards

• Test 10 leads per funnel and confirm full functionality



All tasks are clearly defined in a written SOP.



Trial is task-based pay, not hourly but we will be testing your speed, accuracy and attention to detail.



Required Experience:



• Proven A2P 10DLC approval history inside GHL

• Understanding of Low Volume Mixed vs Marketing campaigns

• Trust Center troubleshooting

• STOP logic testing

• AI Voice integration inside GHL

• Workflow building with tagging and pipeline logic



If you have not successfully fixed a rejected A2P campaign before, do not apply. Do not reply with CHAT AI answers-you will be disqualifie!!!



Screening Questions:



Describe 2 A2P rejections you personally fixed and exactly what was wrong.



After brand approval, where do you attach the phone number to the approved campaign?



What causes Low Brand Vetting score and how do you improve it?



What is one GHL messaging setup mistake that prevents SMS from sending even after approval?



Explain the difference between Low Volume Mixed and Marketing use case.



Payment:

Trial project completion-then hourly

Must complete Trial fully before payment and before permanent hire.

title: Operations Administrator
description:
About Us



We are a growing Australian telehealth business strengthening our operational foundations as we scale.

HR Administration

• Track probation dates and renewals

• Support on boarding documentation

• Ensure records remain accurate and confidential



SOP & Documentation Control

• Ensure version control and naming consistency

• Keep documentation current and structured



Administrative Tracking

• Follow up on missing inputs

Who You Are



• Highly detail-oriented

• Structured and organised

• Strong written English

• Confident using Google Workspace

• Comfortable working independently

Tech/admin/CRM's and IT systems your are comfortable using

title: Amazon FBA Product Research VA (UK Wholesale Model)
description:
Full-Time – 40 Hours Per Week

Starting Salary: £25,000 per month (increases after successful trial period)



We are a growing UK-based Amazon FBA business looking for an experienced Wholesale Product Research Virtual Assistant to join our team full-time.

 automation flows (copy provided, setup handled by you)

Bonus:

- Experience with e-commerce education offers

What we offer

- Long-term collaboration

- A focused team that values clean systems and consistency



If this sounds like a good fit and you have real hands-on experience with GoHighLevel funnels and automations, we’d like to hear from you.

title: Social Media Marketing Manager
description:
Social Media Marketing Manager



Full-Time | 40 Hours Per Week | Long-Term Role



About the Role



We are looking for a Social Media Marketing Manager who understands strategy, consistency, and performance — not just posting.



This role requires someone who can plan, create, schedule, analyze, and optimize social media content across multiple platforms. You must understand how to build engagement, grow audiences, and drive traffic and sales.



This is not a “random posting” role. We need someone who can think strategically and execute consistently.



Core Responsibilities

1. Social Media Strategy & Planning



Develop and manage a structured content calendar



Plan weekly and monthly posting schedules



Align content with promotions, product launches, and campaigns



Ensure consistent brand voice and messaging across platforms



2. Content Creation



Create engaging posts (graphics, captions, short-form videos, reels)



Write compelling captions with strong calls-to-action



Coordinate images, product photos, and short-form video content



Repurpose content across multiple platforms



3. Posting & Scheduling



Schedule posts using social media scheduling tools



Maintain consistent posting frequency



Optimize post timing based on performance data



Manage cross-platform distribution



4. Engagement & Community Management



Monitor comments and messages



Respond professionally and promptly



Encourage engagement and build audience relationships



5. Analytics & Performance Tracking



Track key metrics: reach, engagement rate, follower growth, CTR



Analyze top-performing posts



Make data-driven recommendations for improvement



Report weekly and monthly performance summaries



Platforms You May Manage






Instagram



TikTok



Pinterest



YouTube Shorts



LinkedIn



Required Experience



2+ years of social media management experience



Proven experience building and managing content calendars



Strong writing skills in English



Experience creating graphics and short-form video content



Familiarity with analytics and reporting



Highly organized and deadline-driven



Preferred Experience



Experience with Canva or Adobe tools



Experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, CapCut, etc.)



Experience managing eCommerce or product-based brands



Basic understanding of paid ads (a plus, not required)



40 hours per week



Long-term opportunity



Key Performance Indicators



Consistent posting schedule



Engagement rate growth



Follower growth



Traffic generated from social platforms



Quality and consistency of content



Application Instructions (Important)



To be considered:



Attach your resume/CV.



Share links to social media accounts you have managed.



Provide one example of a content calendar you created.



Briefly explain how you would grow engagement for an eCommerce brand.



Only applicants who follow all instructions will be reviewed.

Are you tired of working as an average Social Media Manager, never growing professionally, and never getting the chance to take your career to the next level?

Unlimited access to almost $10,000 worth of training and courses for both personal skills and development.

Working alongside a team that prioritizes a healthy work environment.

An environment that cultivates personal growth, serving as the foundation for skill development.





Just Simply Marketing (JSM) is a digital marketing agency based in Ontario, Canada, dedicated to helping business coaches, speakers, and experts from the US and Canada build, grow, and monetize their online brands. Specializing in organic marketing strategies, we focus on content creation, social media management, lead generation, and video production to help our clients stand out online. At JSM, we value creativity, excellence, and personal growth in everything we do.

You will work closely with our creatives, video editing, and graphic design teams to review and approve videos and designs, ensuring they align with our clients' brand and strategy. As our Social Media Specialist, you will be the driving force behind our clients' brand growth and increased online presence.

title: DIGITAL BUSINESS MANAGER - MOMENTUM ACADEMY
description:
I run Momentum Academy (business coaching for service business owners) and Success by Numbers (finance director services). I need someone who can own the digital operations side of my business - from social media execution to problem-solving tech issues to setting up new passive income opportunities.



I create the content and strategy - you own the operations, distribution, and implementation. Think of this as running the engine room while I steer the ship.



This isn't a "wait for instructions" VA role. You'll manage all digital marketing operations, content distribution, and tech implementation while I focus on strategy, content creation, and client delivery.



The #1 skill for this role is independent problem-solving. When you encounter a platform you've never used, a task you've never done, or a problem you don't immediately know how to solve - your first instinct must be to research, test, and figure it out yourself, not to ask me for step-by-step instructions.



If you need detailed SOPs and procedures to do your work, this isn't the right role for you.



If you Google things, watch YouTube tutorials, test different approaches, and come back with "here's what I learned and here's what I recommend" - this role is perfect for you.



What You'll Own



Social Media & Podcast Distribution (30%)



Manage content across Instagram,
, YouTube, Snapchat (I create videos, you handle everything else)

Edit and post podcast episodes with show notes, clips, promotional content

Schedule and distribute all content using existing systems

Track performance and recommend improvements



Revenue & Partnership Development (30%)



Research affiliate programs for us to promote (tools/services our audience needs)

Find potential affiliates who could promote our Money Mindset Journal and Academy programs

Set up new sales channels like TikTok Shop

Build landing pages, tracking links,
 sequences for affiliate and partnership campaigns once approved

Present options with recommendations, then I handle the outreach and pitching



Tech Problem-Solving (25%)



Figure out platforms when I get stuck (recent examples: BookVault commission setup, Instagram/Facebook linking)

Research and implement new tools as business needs evolve

Troubleshoot CRM (Go High Level), website, payment systems, integrations

Learn new platforms quickly without needing me to teach you



Business Support (15%)



Daily check-ins to align on priorities and discuss opportunities

Handle correspondence related to podcast guests, partnerships, admin

Keep systems running smoothly

Document processes as you build them





You're the Right Person If:

? Self-directed learner - When you don't know something, you research it (Google, YouTube, help docs, forums) and figure it out rather than waiting for instructions

? Problem-solver first - When something doesn't work, you troubleshoot and try different approaches before escalating to me

? Social media savvy - You understand Instagram,
, YouTube, Snapchat, TikTok and can manage content distribution effectively

? Tech confident - Comfortable with tools like Go High Level, Canva, CapCut, podcast platforms, affiliate networks (or can learn them fast)

? Digital marketing knowledge - Understand funnels, affiliates, landing pages, content strategy

? Takes initiative - You can take "I need this to happen" and make it happen without step-by-step guidance

? Proactive communicator - Daily voice notes/updates feel natural to you



You're NOT Right If:

? You only work well with detailed SOPs and procedures

? You need constant supervision or get stuck without instructions

? You're uncomfortable learning new platforms independently

? You prefer working in isolation rather than daily collaboration

? Your first response to problems is "this doesn't work" rather than "let me try to solve this"

title: Operations Lead - Psychiatric Clinic
description:
Job Summary:

We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Operations lead to join our team at Aurora Wellness (Psychiatry clinic). The ideal candidate will have experience with EHR/ EMR (ideally Osmind) software and possess strong administrative and management skills to support our mental health professionals and patients from a remote setting.



Key Responsibilities:

Reception and Patient Interaction:

Respond to patient inquiries via phone,
, or chat, providing information and directing them to appropriate resources.

Conduct patient intake interviews to gather financial, social, and medical information for admissions and billing purposes.



Administrative Tasks:

Schedule appointments and manage calendars for mental health professionals using AdvancedMD.

Maintain and update patient records in the AdvancedMD electronic health record (EHR) system.

Review, evaluate, and verify admission documents and information for accuracy.



Financial and Billing:

Evaluate medical and billing documents to ensure accuracy and completeness.

Determine insurance carriers for billing purposes and calculate patient liabilities.

Process billing and handle insurance claims using AdvancedMD.



Records Management:

Manage electronic databases and maintain confidential patient records.

Scan, classify, and file documents electronically in the AdvancedMD system.

Ensure compliance with HIPAA regulations while maintaining patient confidentiality.



Qualifications:

College degree required.

Proficiency in Osmind is preferred.

Strong knowledge of medical terminology, particularly related to psychiatric care.

Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

Ability to multitask effectively in a remote environment.



Skills and Abilities:

Proficient in modern office methods, procedures, and technology.

Strong analytical skills for financial computations and billing analysis.

Excellent interpersonal skills for virtual patient interactions and collaboration with tea
mbers.

Ability to handle confidential information with discretion.

Familiarity with insurance billing procedures and regulations.



Physical Requirements:

Ability to work on a computer for extended periods.

Normal manual dexterity and eye-hand coordination.



Working Conditions:

Fully remote position with US based (EST) working hours.

Must have a reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace conducive to professional duties.



The successful candidate will play a crucial role in ensuring the smooth operation of our psychiatric clinic remotely, leveraging Osmind software to enhance efficiency and patient care. If you are passionate about supporting mental health services in a remote capacity, we encourage you to apply!



Please attach a copy of your resume,your relevant experience at a previous clinic or in healthcare, and a 60-second voice recording of you introducing yourself and

title: Creative Support Specialist (Quality Assurance Focus)
description:
OBSESSED WITH GREAT DESIGN — BUT EVEN MORE OBSESSED WITH WHY IT WORKS?

Schedule: Monday–Friday | 8:00 AM–5:00 PM (PHT)

Location: 100% Remote

Open to Filipino Applicants Only

You don’t just look at a design and say “nice.”



You immediately notice:

The spacing feels off

The typography doesn’t match the brand voice

The feedback pattern no one else caught

 The real reason the client wasn’t satisfied

If that sounds like you — keep reading.

This is NOT a design role.

This is a Design Quality Powerhouse Role.

We’re Hiring: Creative Support Specialist

You will be the quality guardian of our creative team.

You won’t create visuals.

You’ll analyze them.

Break them down.

Spot patterns.

Reduce revisions.

Improve systems.

You protect the standard.

You elevate the team.



WHAT YOU’LL ACTUALLY DO

• Audit completed design projects (especially neutral/negative feedback cases)

• Compare output against client briefs & brand guidelines

• Translate messy client feedback into clear action steps

• Identify recurring issues across designers

• Report findings to Team Leaders & HR

• Recommend workflow & training improvements

• Help reduce cancellations

• Improve client satisfaction scores



This role is analytical. Objective. Impact-driven.



WHAT MAKES YOU A STRONG FIT

• Deep understanding of layout, typography, branding & color theory

• Analytical thinker (you separate taste from technical issues)

• Background in QA, art direction, creative review, or quality control (highly preferred)

• Comfortable giving direct, evidence-based feedback

• Extremely detail-oriented & organized

• Data-driven and enjoys spotting trends



You don’t take feedback personally.

You turn it into systems improvement.



TECH REQUIREMENTS

• Reliable computer (can open/edit design files)

• Stable high-speed internet

• Webcam (720p or higher)

• Clear headset/microphone



WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING WITH US

• Performance incentives & recognition

• Supportive remote culture

• Clear growth path

• Paid maternity & paternity leave

• Monthly contests & creative challenges

• Long-term stable role

• Paid time off (monthly accrual)

• Wellness & mental health support

• Continuous training & mentorship



BONUS IF YOU:

• Have used project management or ticketing tools

• Have both Graphic Design + Customer Support/Success background

• Can create simple trend or quality reports

• Enjoy turning chaotic feedback into structured insights



HOW TO APPLY

1? Complete the form:

2? For “Please type the magic phrase”, enter: qualitymatters

3? Attach your portfolio & resume (highlight QA or creative review experience).

title: Care Coordination Specialist — Remote
description:
Position Summary



A U.S.-based healthcare organization is seeking a professional, detail-oriented Care Coordination Specialist to support patients with chronic health conditions. This role involves conducting scheduled phone calls, gathering essential information, documenting care needs, and helping patients connect with ongoing support services.



The ideal candidate communicates clearly, demonstrates empathy, follows structured processes, and maintains a high standard of accuracy and professionalism in every interaction.



?



Key Responsibilities

 • Conduct scheduled outbound and follow-up calls to patients

 • Collect and document health-related and support information accurately

 • Identify patient needs and potential barriers to care

 • Maintain clear, respectful, and professional communication

 • Enter detailed notes into designated systems

 • Safeguard patient confidentiality at all times

 • Meet established productivity and quality standards



?



Required Qualifications

 • Excellent spoken English with clear, neutral pronunciation

 • Strong interpersonal and active listening skills

 • Experience in customer service, call center operations, or healthcare support

 • Ability to follow structured workflows and instructions precisely

 • High attention to detail and documentation accuracy

 • Reliable computer, noise-canceling headset, and high-speed internet

 • Quiet, professional home workspace

 • Ability to work during U.S. Eastern Time business hours



?



Preferred Qualifications

 • Experience supporting U.S.-based customers or patients

 • Background in healthcare, nursing, psychology, or allied health

 • Case management, telehealth, or care coordination experience

 • Comfort speaking with older adults or vulnerable populations



?



Work Schedule



Work hours are aligned with U.S. Eastern Time business operations.

Specific shifts will be assigned during onboarding.



?



Application Process



Interested candidates should submit a current resume along with a brief statement describing their experience communicating with U.S.-based customers or patients.



Qualified applicants will be contacted for the next steps in the selection process.



?



About the Role



This position offers the opportunity to make a meaningful impact by helping individuals receive consistent support for their health while working remotely in a structured, professional environment.

NOW THE IMPORTANT PART - HOW YOU CAN APPLY:
