title: Ebay & Walmart Account Manager
description:
About Us – EVORETRO



EVORETRO is a fast-growing international brand specializing in collectible protection and display accessories. We sell globally through major marketplaces including eBay and Walmart Marketplace.

We are looking for a skilled and reliable eBay & Walmart Account Manager to manage and grow our marketplace accounts.

 

*Important: This Is NOT a Managerial Role. This is an account management / execution role only. You will not manage staff or lead a team.



Your focus will be:

 •Managing listings

 •Running and optimizing ads

 •Monitoring performance

 •Coordinating with other departments

 •Supporting customer experience when needed

 

What You’ll Be Doing

1. Marketplace Account Management

 •Manage daily operations of our eBay and Walmart accounts

 •Create and optimize product listings (titles, SEO, keywords, images, descriptions)

 •Monitor pricing and competitor activity

 •Maintain strong account health and compliance

 •Sync and monitor inventory with Shopify



2. Advertising (Creation ? Optimization ? Scaling)

 •Create and launch:

 •eBay Promoted Listings

 •Walmart Connect campaigns

 •Optimize campaigns for better ROAS and conversion

 •Analyze data and improve performance

 •Scale ads when results are strong and profitable



3. Sales & Performance Growth

 •Drive consistent monthly revenue growth

 •Track KPIs:

-Revenue

-Traffic

-Conversion rate

-Ad performance

-Defect rate

-Identify winning SKUs and growth opportunities

-Suggest promotions and sales strategies



4. Operations & Collaboration

 •Ensure on-time shipping and minimal cancellations

 •Coordinate with 3PL partners

 •Work closely with:

 -Marketing team (campaign alignment)

 -Supply chain (inventory planning)

 •Customer support (feedback trends & order issues)



5. Light Customer Support

 •Respond to buyer messages when needed

 •Help resolve returns and disputes

 •Maintain:

-Positive feedback ?99%

-Low defect rate

-Top Rated Seller standards (eBay)



 •What We’re Looking For

- 2+ years experience managing an eBay account

-Experience with Walmart Marketplace



  •Strong experience with:

-eBay Seller Hub & Promoted Listings

-Walmart Seller Center

-Walmart Connect

-Data-driven and detail-oriented

-Fluent in English (written and spoken)

-Organized and proactive

-Able to work independently without constant supervision



 •Success Metrics

-Increase monthly sales by 10–20%

-Improve conversion rate consistently

-Maintain strong account health metrics

-Achieve profitable ROAS on ads

-Maintain positive feedback ?99%



  •Why Join EVORETRO?

-Fast-growing international brand

-Long-term opportunity

-Direct collaboration with leadership

-Opportunity to specialize in marketplace growth

-Performance-driven environment



If you are a hands-on marketplace specialist who enjoys optimizing, testing, and scaling accounts — we’d love to hear from you.



To apply:

Send your resume and briefly explain your experience managing BOTH eBay and Walmart accounts, including results you achieved (sales growth, ROAS, account health improvements, etc.).

title: Finance Manager for an Australian Fashion Company
description:
We’re on the hunt for a proactive, detail-obsessed Finance Manager based in the Philippines to join our warm and fast-growing team - someone with proven experience in the Australian taxation system, strong Xero skills, and end-to-end payroll experience.



We’re Proud Poppy - an Australian fashion label shaking up the industry with bold prints, inclusive sizing (6–30), and a community-first vibe. We’re scaling fast and we need a Finance Manager who can keep our numbers, compliance, and payroll running like clockwork.



You’ll work alongside our in-house Australian team and offshore crew, and partner closely with our external accountant/tax agent to keep everything compliant, organised, and running smoothly.



Must-Haves

- Full-time availability during Australian business hours (AEST)

- Proud Poppy must be your only client/employer (we’re happy to offer additional hours if desired)

- Demonstrated experience working with the Australian taxation system

- Strong Xero experience (bank reconciliations, journals, AR/AP, month-end processes)

- Payroll experience, including pay runs, leave tracking, and payroll reconciliations

- Excellent written and spoken English with strong communication skills

- High attention to detail, strong organisation, and the ability to work independently

- High integrity and confidentiality when handling sensitive financial and payroll information

- A genuine desire for growth and long-term career progression

- Positive energy, initiative, and a proactive attitude



Nice to Have

- Ecommerce finance experience (inventory/COGS, Shopify payouts, payment gateways like Stripe/PayPal)

- Experience building SOPs and improving finance processes

- Experience with: Shopify, Asana, Google Sheets dashboards, payment gateways (Stripe/PayPal), inventory tools (e.g., ShipHero)



What You’ll Be Doing

- Own the day-to-day finance function in Xero

- Support Australian tax compliance

- Run payroll end-to-end

- Deliver reporting that helps the business make better decisions

- Keep things clean, clear, and scalable



Who You Are

- You love clean numbers, tidy reconciliations, and systems that make sense.

- You take ownership and don’t wait to be told what to do.

- You spot issues early and fix them before they become problems.

- You’re calm under pressure, organised by nature, and driven by accuracy.

- You communicate clearly, ask smart questions, and keep stakeholders in the loop.

- You want to grow with a brand that’s building something special.



How to Apply

If this sounds like you and you’re excited to grow with Proud Poppy, we’d love to hear from you.

Please send your application with the subject line: Proud Poppy - Finance Manager 2026

Include:

A link to your resume/CV

A short cover letter highlighting your AU tax + Xero + payroll experience

title: Technical Specialist (w/ GHL Experience)
description:
Ascend Group is a fully remote digital marketing company. We exist to equip entrepreneurs and purpose-driven businesses to thrive in the new AI economy through strategic marketing, education, and scalable systems with AI-first thinking.





At Ascend, we are a remote-first team of A-players who value growth, performance, and transparency. We move fast, build with clarity, and honor each tea
mber’s ideas, ownership, and craft. If you want to expand your capabilities, contribute meaningfully, and grow in a no-politics, high-performance environment, this is your place.





We’re seeking a Technical Specialist who can own mid-level automation builds and integrations across multiple client workflows. This role goes beyond fixing bugs—it's about building reliable systems, solving integration challenges with clarity, and championing operational excellence through technical precision. If you’re excited to turn automation blueprints into seamless reality and drive cross-functional efficiency, we’d love to have you on our team.

title: Social Media Content Creator & Strategist
description:
Ascend Group is a fully remote digital marketing company. We exist to equip entrepreneurs and purpose-driven businesses to thrive in the new AI economy through strategic marketing, education, and scalable systems with AI-first thinking.





At Ascend, we are a remote-first team of A-players who value growth, performance, and transparency. We move fast, build with clarity, and honor each tea
mber’s ideas, ownership, and craft. If you want to expand your capabilities, contribute meaningfully, and grow in a no-politics, high-performance environment, this is your place.





We're on a mission to amplify our brand presence and build meaningful connections across multiple social media platforms, with Instagram as a key priority. As our Social Media Content Creator & Strategist, your role goes beyond creating content; you’ll be driving impactful engagement, growing our Instagram following, and turning audiences into loyal advocates. We’re looking for someone passionate about digital storytelling, strategic in content planning, and seasoned in managing and scaling Instagram accounts, all while being relentless in the pursuit of excellence.





IMPORTANT NOTE: Only those who have completed and submitted the job application form properly via the link below will be considered for the role.

/AG-JobApplicationForm







Role Objectives:



- Elevate Brand Presence: Develop and execute a cohesive social media strategy that amplifies our brand voice across platforms, with a focus on creating a compelling narrative that resonates with our target audience.

- Drive Engagement and Growth: Take ownership of growing our social media footprint. Your goal is to turn creative content into viral sensations, driving a significant increase in followers, engagement, and ultimately, brand loyalty.

- Innovate and Adapt: Stay ahead of the curve by identifying emerging trends and adapting our content strategy to leverage these opportunities. You’ll be expected to continually test new formats and ideas to optimize our social media performance.

- Strategic Content Creation: Produce and oversee the creation of short-form viral videos and other engaging content that not only captures attention but also converts viewers into engaged community members.

- Data-Driven Decisions: Use insights from social media analytics to inform strategy and content creation. Your ability to interpret data and adjust tactics will be key to driving continuous improvement.

- Collaborative Leadership: Work closely with the marketing team to align social media efforts with broader campaign objectives, ensuring that our content strategy supports and enhances overall marketing initiatives.





Requirements:



- 5+ years of experience in strategizing and creating social media content, with a strong focus on managing Instagram accounts and growing follower engagement.

- Create, manage, and oversee the production of compelling short-form viral videos, effectively coordinating with all stakeholders.

- Identify and analyze viral video trends, recommending 20-30 repurposing ideas weekly.

Repurpose long-form videos into engaging short-form content for various social media platforms.

- Drive independent initiatives, taking ownership of key results to grow TikTok, Instagram, and other social media platform followers.

- Research and suggest viral formats for continual testing and optimal engagement.

- Craft attention-grabbing viral copies and design visually appealing images.

- Break down social media data to derive insights and test hypotheses for improved performance.

- Develop and execute a viral social media strategy tailored for each platform.

- Collaborate with the marketing team to generate product marketing campaigns with social media content.

- Stay up-to-date with the latest social media trends and best practices, making recommendations for integration into strategies.

- Plan and manage the social media calendar for up to a quarter.

title: VIDEO EDITOR cinematic E-Commerce Product Videos (No Reels!) GIG / PROJECT-BASED
description:
About Us:



We are a rapidly growing marketing agency from Germany, recognized as a market leader in our field. Our team is young, motivated, and passionate about producing outstanding content.



We specialize in creating high-quality, aesthetic product videos for online shops and Amazon product pages. These are not simple UGC e-commerce clips, but branding-oriented videos that elevate the perception of a product and make it stand out.



For an upcoming production phase, we are looking for Remote Video Editors to support us for a limited time on a gig basis.



What You Will Do:

You will edit high-end product videos with a strong focus on branding and aesthetics.



You will receive:

•Raw footage + assets

•A detailed script / storyboard

•Clear editing guidelines



Your tasks:

• Cut and edit product videos in Premiere Pro

• I mprove pacing, rhythm, visual flow, and aesthetics

• Basic to advanced polishing in After Effects (motion graphics, text overlays, clean transitions)

• Image enhancement / cleanup in Photoshop when needed

• Optional: Generate or enhance shots using AI tools when required



Requirements

• Strong experience in video editing

• Very good Premiere Pro skills

• Good After Effects + Photoshop skills

• A strong sense for aesthetics, design, and branding

• Experience with AI-based shot generation or enhancement (preferred)

• Good English communication skills

• High-speed internet connection (projects can be large, average ~100GB)

• Ability to work fast, clean, and follow clear processes



How to Apply

•Please apply with the subject: "Gold-Video-Gig"

Include:

• Your best portfolio links (product ads preferred)

• Your software experience (Premiere, AE, PS)

• Your weekly availability (20h or 40h)

• Your expected rate (per video or per hour)

• Eagerness to create amazing, aesthetic product videos with branding impact

Benefits:

If you're passionate about creating high-end, branding-focused product videos and are looking for a long-term, fulfilling career, we'd love to hear from you. Apply today to become a part of our success story!

Immediate / Today

 Important Note:

title: Operations & CRM Mangement (Electrical Services - Remote
description:
About Us



We are a growing Australian electrical company looking for a proactive Operations & Systems Manager to help us scale.



We are new to hiring this type of role and are looking for someone who can not only manage admin and CRM tasks — but also help us build structure, implement systems, and create Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) as we grow.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who wants to take ownership and become a key part of the business.



The Role

You will sit between:

• Customers

• Our scheduling calendar

• SIMPRO (job management system)

• Our CRM

• The business owner



Your role is to ensure our operations run smoothly, efficiently, and professionally — while helping us improve and systemise how we work.



Key Responsibilities

1. CRM Ownership

- Manage all incoming leads and enquiries

- Ensure fast response times

- Track quotes and ensure consistent follow-up

- Maintain accurate pipeline stages

- Improve CRM workflows and automation



2. SIMPRO & Job Coordination

- Create and update jobs

- Schedule technicians efficiently

- Maintain correct job statuses

- Prepare invoices for approval

- Ensure job documentation is complete

- Identify inefficiencies in job flow



3. Process & SOP Development

- Document repeatable tasks into clear SOPs

- Create checklists for admin and operations

- Improve existing workflows

- Suggest automation opportunities

- Help build structure as the business grows



4. Customer Communication

- Respond to
s professionally

- Send booking confirmations and reminders

- Follow up on outstanding quotes and invoices

- Maintain high customer service standards



5. Reporting & Growth Support

- Provide a weekly operations report

- Identify bottlenecks and recommend improvements

- Support the owner in freeing up time from daily admin



What We Are Looking For

We need someone who:

- Thinks in systems, not just tasks

- Is proactive and solution-focused

- Can work independently

- Is confident implementing improvements

- Has strong organisational skills

- Communicates clearly and professionally

- Wants long-term growth within a business



Required Experience

- 2+ years in operations, admin, or service business support

- Experience managing CRM systems

- Experience with scheduling and coordination

- Experience creating SOPs or documenting processes



Highly Preferred:

- SIMPRO experience (or similar job management software)

- Experience supporting Australian businesses

- Experience improving workflows or implementing systems

- CRM management



What Success Looks Like (First 90 Days)

- CRM is organised and up to date

- Jobs are scheduled efficiently with minimal oversight

- Clear SOPs are created for recurring tasks

- Weekly performance reports delivered consistently

- The owner is significantly less involved in daily admin



Application Instructions

To apply:

1. Start your application with: “I build systems.”

2. Record a short 2–3 minute video introducing yourself.

3. Describe a process you improved in a previous role.

4. List your experience with CRM systems and job scheduling software.

5. Explain how you would build SOPs for a growing service business.



We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who wants to grow with us and take real ownership of operations.

title: Amazon Catalog Coordinator
description:
Amazon Catalog Coordinator

Up to $1,600 Monthly + Benefits



We are looking for an Amazon Catalog Coordinator to help manage catalogs on 
. We are looking for someone who understands the importance of optimized product detail pages and how to help us win the digital shelf through best-in-class product content. The successful candidate will spend most of their time within the 
 Seller Central or Vendor Central portal, ensuring digital merchandising strategy is best in class. We are looking for someone with strong attention to detail and firm knowledge of how to create new product listings and variation families, upload digital content, and audit detail pages for accuracy. If you are excited about working in a fast-moving space with an opportunity to expand skills on Amazon as well as across other ecommerce platforms, this is the perfect job for you.



Responsibilities

*Work with client success managers (CSMs) and account directors (ADs) to implement the product detail page changes for clients on Amazon.

*Communicate directly with the team on tasks related to catalog optimization efforts.

*Monitor product sales and trends using the proprietary sales and reporting dashboard.

*Collect product data and organize it into the product management software.

*Create, optimize, and upload listing content—titles, bullet points, and descriptions.

*Upload enhanced digital assets created by the internal creative team—A+ content, videos, images, and brand stores.

*Run product page diagnostics on existing products on Amazon to determine the accuracy of the content.

*Conduct product and competitor research to aid in executing an effective listing strategy.

*Monitor both account and listing health closely to limit listing and account downtime.

*Report product pages that fraudulently use the clients' trademarks or copyrighted material.

*Respond to buyer messages in a timely manner while providing excellent customer service.

*Maintain current knowledge of Amazon's policies and best practices for product listings.

*Other responsibilities that come when working with a growing agency.



Successful Candidates

*2–5+ years’ experience working with and on 
 (Vendor Central and Seller Central).

*Proficient in both Seller Central and Vendor Central, with a primary focus on the Vendor Central catalog.

*Bonus points for experience working on international catalogs in Vendor Central.

*Knowledge of the Amazon back-end and the ability to load new products, create variations, fix suppressed listings, upload creative content, and do other similar work within the Amazon portal.

*An extreme eye for detail with impeccable organization skills.

*Proficient multitasker with the ability to manage many tasks at once.

*Ability to work in a collaborative environment.

*A problem solver who can work with the many challenges and inconsistencies the Amazon platform provides.

*English speaking—an effective and timely communicator.

*Proficient in Microsoft Excel.

*Bachelor’s degree in business, marketing, or a related field is preferred.



Benefits

*3 weeks of PTO

*10 holidays

*2 personal days



Please send your application to 
 using the answer to '1,782/54x720+14.98+22' as the subject line.

title: Revit Modeler
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS ROLE, YOU MUST SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND VIDEO INTRODUCTION.******



Revit Modeler



Job Type: Part-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 6:00 AM to 11:00 AM Pacific Time Zone

Salary: $750 per month 



Job Overview: 

We are looking for a skilled and detail-oriented Revit Modeler to join a creative architectural and design team. This role requires proficiency in 3D modeling and building information modeling (BIM) using Revit, as well as experience collaborating with design professionals to produce accurate and high-quality construction documents. 



Key Responsibilities:

Develop precise and detailed 3D designs using Revit software.

Collaborate with architects, designers, and engineers to produce construction drawings.

Draft and detail plans for structures, foundations, and building systems based on sketches, concepts, calculations, and specifications.

Modify and update existing Revit models with design changes.

Ensure the accuracy and quality of models while adhering to deadlines.

Maintain knowledge of construction methodologies, codes, and industry compliance standards.

Utilize advanced Revit tools including keynoting, callouts, elevations, floor plans, and sheet organization.

Coordinate and consult with tea
mbers to optimize structural layouts and components.



Qualifications:

Proven experience using Revit in architectural or construction environments.

Strong understanding of BIM (Building Information Modeling) and 3D modeling processes.

Proficiency in Canva for visual presentation and documentation purposes.

Knowledge of construction codes, compliance standards, and methodologies.

Solid grasp of architectural and engineering principles.

Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy.

Excellent communication and collaboration skills.

Ability to manage multiple deadlines in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.





Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Instructional Designer
description:
Instructional Designer

$875 to $1,100 Monthly



We’re looking for a detail-oriented learning professional to support our training team. The role will be responsible for creating and updating learning management system (LMS) courses and training materials using adult learning theories, interactive elements, and our brand style guide. You’ll be responsible for ensuring our LMS and reporting are accurate, refreshing outdated courses and process documentation, and keeping our agency’s tea
mbers on top of their course assignments. Other responsibilities include drafting and updating training plans and standard operating procedures, as well as conducting learning and development administrative work and training meetings.



Responsibilities



LMS Management

* Data entry for updating, adding, and removing users and courses.

* Crafting engaging LMS courses using our brand style, guidelines for training, adult learning theory, and the materials provided by subject matter experts.

* Reviewing feedback forms provided on each course to ensure feedback is implemented and/or passed along to the instructors and learning and development leadership.

 

Training Materials

* Creating and updating PowerPoint presentations using our brand style, guidelines for training, adult learning theory, and the materials provided by subject matter experts.

* Creating and updating training plan templates and onboarding documents.

* Collaborating with members of the learning and development team and subject matter experts on learning initiatives and developing course content.



Reporting

* Supporting and conducting needs analyses that inform course and training contents.

* Auditing our LMS courses, users, and learning progress to ensure accuracy in our reporting.

* Reviewing feedback forms and sharing reports with instructors and learning and development leadership.

 

Administrative Tasks for Learning and Development

* Support maintaining data hygiene of our project management trackers.

* Onboarding, offboarding, extended leave, and position change tasks.

* Creating and updating Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for the organization using our brand style and the materials provided by subject matter experts.

* Maintaining organization in SharePoint of SOPs and training resources, including archiving materials that become irrelevant.



Requirements

* 5+ years of experience in talent and learning development, ideally within a marketing or agency environment.

* Strong understanding of learning management systems, project management platforms, integrations, and automations.

* Preferred experience with TalentLMS, 
, and the Microsoft Office Suite, including SharePoint.

* Proficient in adult learning theory and emerging learning and development trends to enhance training experiences for the modern workplace.

* Experience creating engaging courses and training plans.

* Excellent communication skills: proactive, detailed, and solutions-oriented.

* Ability to prioritize and manage multiple simultaneous deadlines.

* Collaborative spirit and ability to thrive in an autonomous, remote-first environment.

* Curiosity and a drive to innovate.

* Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

* Creative problem-solving and adaptability in a fast-changing environment.

* Strong project management and organization skills.

* Strong understanding of digital channels.



Please send your application to 
 using the most recent SOP title you created as the subject line.

title: Construction Estimator / Take-Off Specialist
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS ROLE, YOU MUST SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND VIDEO INTRODUCTION.******



Construction Estimator / Take-Off Specialist



Job Type: Part-Time (minimum 20 hours per week)

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 1:00 PM to 5:00 PM Pacific Time

Salary: $700 per month



Job Overview: 

We are looking for a highly skilled and detail-driven Construction Estimator / Take-Off Specialist to support our commercial construction projects by delivering precise quantity take-offs and accurate cost estimates. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in Bluebeam and PlanSwift, with the ability to confidently read and interpret architectural and structural drawings for tenant improvements, retail construction, and ground-up multifamily developments. This role plays a critical part in the pre-construction process, helping ensure competitive, well-prepared bids and smooth project execution. The position will begin as part-time with the opportunity to transition into a full-time role as workload and performance align with company growth.



Key Responsibilities:

Perform detailed quantity take-offs using Bluebeam and PlanSwift

Review and interpret architectural and structural drawings accurately

Prepare cost estimates based on plans, specifications, and project scope

Assist with bid preparation and pricing analysis

Organize and manage project documentation

Communicate effectively with project managers and internal teams

Maintain organized tracking sheets and estimating logs in Excel



Required Qualifications:

Prior experience supporting U.S.-based commercial construction projects

Experience working remotely with construction or estimating teams

Strong expertise in Bluebeam for construction take-offs

Proficiency in PlanSwift take-off software

Advanced ability in reading and interpreting construction plans

Experience in commercial construction, preferably:

Tenant Improvements

Retail Construction

Ground-Up Multifamily Projects

Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel

Strong working knowledge of Microsoft Outlook

High attention to detail and accuracy

Strong organizational and time-management skills





Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Peer Support Facilitator - Runners/Athletes Preferred (Remote, No Credentials)
description:
AfterShift is a peer support platform for burnt-out professionals who need someone who's "been there."



We're looking for 5-10 facilitators - specifically RUNNERS, ENDURANCE ATHLETES, or people who understand what it means to push through discomfort.



WHY RUNNERS/ATHLETES?



Because you already know how to:

- Stay present when things get hard

- Regulate yourself under stress

- Listen to your body and mind

- Not quit when it's uncomfortable

- Support others without "fixing" them



You've lived through intensity. That's what matters here.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- 20-60 minute peer conversations (NOT therapy, NOT coaching)

- Hold space for burnt-out professionals, tech workers, healthcare workers, founders

- Listen without rushing to fix

- Share perspective from your own transitions

- Work completely remotely via video calls

- Set your own schedule



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR:



People with backgrounds in:

- Running (ultrarunners, marathoners, trail runners)

- Endurance sports (Ironman, triathletes, cyclists)

- Climbing / bouldering

- Surfing / water sports

- Yoga / meditation practice

- MMA / martial arts

- Long-term travel / backpacking

- Any sport/practice that teaches you to regulate under pressure



AND who have also navigated:

- Career transitions

- Burnout recovery

- Major life changes

- Relocation / starting over

- Identity shifts



WHAT WE VALUE:

- Comfort in discomfort

- Self-regulation under stress

- Listen more than you talk

- Don't rush to "fix" people

- Non-clinical, non-guru approach

- You've been through intensity and came out grounded



COMPENSATION:

- Earn 60% of session fees

- ?700 per 20-min session (~$15 USD)

- ?1,050 per 30-min session (~$21 USD)

- ?1,600 per 60-min session (~$36 USD)

- Paid weekly via Stripe/PayPal/Wise

- Potential: ?15,000-?30,000/month part-time (5-10 sessions/week)



REQUIREMENTS:

- Active runner, athlete, or movement practitioner

- You've navigated a major life transition (career change, burnout, relocation, etc.)

- Stable internet connection

- Comfortable with video calls

- Available 5-10 hours per week

- Fluent English

- 25+ years old



TIME ZONE:

- Serve clients globally

- Flexible scheduling (some evening/night hours ideal for US/Europe clients)

- Or focus on Asia/Pacific timezone



WHAT THIS IS NOT:

- NOT therapy or counseling

- NOT life coaching

- NOT training/fitness advice

- NOT medical advice

- This is peer-to-peer clarity conversations ONLY



EXAMPLES OF WHO FITS PERFECTLY:



"I ran my first ultra after leaving a corporate job that was killing me. I know what it's like to rebuild."



"I've been climbing for 10 years. It taught me how to stay calm when things feel impossible. I've also navigated burnout in tech and a major career pivot."



"I'm a long-distance runner and former nurse. I left bedside care after burnout. I wish I'd had someone to talk to who understood both the grind and the transition."



"I practice yoga daily and went through a difficult divorce while working 60-hour weeks. I learned how to hold space for discomfort."



TO APPLY:

Tell us:

1. Your running/sport/movement background

2. What major life transition(s) you've navigated

3. Why this resonates with you

title: Operations Associate, High Ownership Generalist (Remote, US Eastern Hours)
description:
Remote, full-time operations role on US Eastern hours

We pay premium for top 1% talent in a supportive, high-trust team



About Reel Ventures

Reel Ventures is a small international fintech and investment company with a team of about 20 people. We are long-term focused and have built a stable team with many people staying for years.



We hire for raw talent. We look for smart, ambitious, independent people who learn fast and take ownership. In return, we offer a supportive work environment, strong teammates, and above-market upside for people who perform.



This is a remote, work from home position.



The role

This is a high ownership operations role combining client communication and operational problem solving.



You will:

-Communicate with clients via inbox and support tickets using clear, professional English

-Investigate issues end to end, often with incomplete information

-Do accuracy-focused ops work in our internal system, including reconciling deposits and withdrawals, tracking balances, and resolving discrepancies

-Perform QA checks and keep records clean and reliable



Roughly 60 percent of the role is client communication and roughly 40 percent is operations and investigation.



Team and growth

You will work with capable, hardworking teammates in the Philippines and internationally. Many have backgrounds from top PH universities and experience across engineering, accounting and finance, account management, customer success, and startup operations.



AI is part of the job. You will learn to use AI tools to work faster and with higher quality, and over time build repeatable prompts and workflows that make you more effective. This is a career-accelerating skill.



As you become faster, more reliable, and more proactive, we increase responsibility and compensation.



What we look for

-Strong written English and clear thinking

-Comfort with numbers and attention to detail

-High initiative and good judgment

-Reliable responsiveness during working hours

-Curious, asks questions, learns fast



Schedule

Full-time, 40 hours per week, US Eastern hours. Exact shift is discussed during interviews.



Compensation and benefits

We pay above market for top talent. Compensation depends on skill and performance, with regular reviews.



Benefits include performance bonus, 13th month pay, 15 PTO days per year plus PH public holidays.



Hiring process

We move quickly, usually within a few days. If your application looks strong, we will invite you to an interview. Some candidates complete a short TestGorilla assessment, which may include a brief intro video. The final step is a paid take-home case, and then we make an offer.



How to apply

Start your message with: REEL VENTURES

Please apply using at least 5 Apply Points. We prioritize reviewing those first.



Answer these two questions:

1. In 5 to 8 sentences, why are you a strong fit for a high ownership operations role, and what do you want to grow into over the next 12 months?

2. Tell us about a time you solved a problem with incomplete information. What steps did you take?



About the founder

I am the CEO and founder of Reel Ventures. If you want to learn more about who you would be working with, you can view my LinkedIn profile here:

 marketing campaigns)

pany pages professionally

title: Property Management Customer Service Representative
description:

About Us



Altus Property Partners is an investor-operated property management company that manages multifamily apartment buildings, single-family rental portfolios, and condominium associations. We combine best-in-class technology with a high-touch service model to deliver a superior experience for residents, owners, and board members alike.



We are now expanding our remote customer service team and are seeking a proactive, resourceful, and detail-oriented individual with a background in property management, real estate operations, or residential leasing.



About the Role

-Follows up with tenants, board members, and owners

-Gathers missing details and context through calls and
s

-Translates those conversations into actionable tickets and tasks for our internal teams

-Assists with lease renewals, collections follow-ups, general support cases



This is not a passive call center position — we need someone who can think like an operator, ask the right questions, and move fast to get problems resolved or information routed accurately.

 channels (Buildium, GHL, etc.)

Must-Have Skills & Traits

title: General Accountant
description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW:

SimpleKeep is a modern US-based accounting company that values our team and creates a fun, dynamic work environment. Our goal is to provide exceptional accounting services to our clients while fostering a positive and supportive team culture. We are a remote team that leverages the latest technology to work together efficiently and effectively.

We're a great company to work for, and a small team, so you'll be able to come in and really have an impact on the way we do business. We're growing, and we’re looking to add an experienced person to our team.



POSITION OVERVIEW:

SimpleKeep is a dynamic and innovative company committed to providing exceptional financial services to our clients. We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented General Accountant with experience in QuickBooks and Xero to join our remote team. This role is perfect for a self-motivated individual who thrives in a fast-paced environment and is looking to contribute to a growing company.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Financial Reporting:

- Prepare, examine, and analyze financial statements, ensuring accuracy and compliance with accounting standards.

- Generate monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports for management review.

2. Bookkeeping:

- Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of all financial transactions.

- Reconcile bank statements, accounts payable, and accounts receivable.

3. Budgeting and Forecasting:

- Assist in the preparation of budgets and financial forecasts.

- Monitor and report on budget variances.

4. Tax Preparation:

- Assist in the preparation and filing of tax returns.

- Ensure compliance with federal, state, and local tax regulations.

5. Accounts Management:

- Manage and process payroll, invoices, and expense reports.

- Handle accounts payable and receivable, ensuring timely payments and collections.

6. Software Utilization:

- Utilize QuickBooks and Xero for all accounting functions.

- Ensure accurate data entry and maintenance within these systems.

7. Compliance and Audit:

- Ensure compliance with internal financial and accounting policies and procedures.

- Assist with internal and external audits as needed.

title: Accounting Supervisor
description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW:

SimpleKeep is a modern US-based accounting company that values our team and creates a fun, dynamic work environment. Our goal is to provide exceptional accounting services to our clients while fostering a positive and supportive team culture. We are a remote team that leverages the latest technology to work together efficiently and effectively.



We're a great company to work for, and a small team, so you'll be able to come in and really have an impact on the way we do business. We're growing, and we’re looking to add an experienced person to our team.



POSITION OVERVIEW:

We’re seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Accounting Supervisor with proficiency in QuickBooks and Xero to join our growing remote team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in accounting, a passion for mentoring and developing staff, and a desire to work in a dynamic and supportive team environment. This is a remote position with flexible work hours.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Supervision and Leadership:

- Manage and oversee daily accounting operations, including accounts payable, accounts receivable, and general ledger.

- Mentor and provide guidance to junior accountants and other tea
mbers.

- Conduct performance evaluations and provide feedback to staff.

- Develop and maintain accounting policies and procedures.

2. Financial Reporting:

- Oversee the preparation and analysis of financial statements.

- Ensure timely and accurate monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.

- Provide financial analysis and insights to clients.

3. Bookkeeping and Reconciliation

- Ensure accurate and timely recording of financial transactions.

- Oversee bank reconciliations, accounts payable, and accounts receivable processes.

- Ensure accurate and timely month-end and year-end close processes.

- Prepare financial statements and other financial reports.

4. Budgeting and Forecasting:

- Lead the preparation of budgets and financial forecasts.

- Monitor budget performance and report variances.

5. Tax Compliance:

- Supervise the preparation and filing of tax returns.

- Ensure compliance with federal, state, and local tax regulations.

6. Software Utilization:

- Oversee the use of QuickBooks and Xero for all accounting functions.

- Ensure data integrity and accuracy within these systems.

7. Audit and Compliance:

- Ensure compliance with internal financial and accounting policies and procedures.

- Coordinate and support internal and external audits.

8. Communication:

- Communicate effectively with clients, vendors, and financial institutions.

- Provide clear and concise reports and updates to senior management.

- Ensure excellent English communication within the team and with stakeholders.

- Provide exceptional customer service to clients.

- Collaborate with other departments to streamline processes and improve efficiency.



QUALIFICATIONS:

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.

- CPA certification preferred.

- Minimum of 5 years of accounting experience, with at least 2 years in a supervisory role.

- Proficiency in QuickBooks and Xero is mandatory.

- Strong understanding of accounting principles and financial reporting.

- Excellent organizational and time-management skills.

- Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

- Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks.

- Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.

- Experience in managing remote teams and working with US clients.

- Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and other accounting software.

- Efficient, personable, adaptable, and organized.



WORK ENVIRONMENT:

This is a remote position; candidates must have a reliable internet connection and a dedicated workspace.



BENEFITS:

- Competitive salary and benefits package.

- Flexible work hours and remote work environment.

- Opportunities for growth and advancement.

- A supportive team culture that values work-life balance and employee satisfaction.

- Health card benefit after 9 months of employment.



WORKING SCHEDULE: Tuesday-Saturday 3am-12nn Manila Time



APPLICATION INSTRUCTION:

After you're done reading through the post, if you're ready to apply for the position, please send an
 to 
 sending your
, please be sure to:

- Attach your resume.

- Include a summary of your experience.

title: EXPERIENCED SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR | Flexi Schedule
description:
We’re hiring someone who knows how to turn long-form content into sharp, high-retention short videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is for someone who understands pacing, hooks, and visual rhythm in short-form content, and knows how to edit with intention rather than just cutting clips.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflow

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: Experienced Graphic Designer / Photo Retoucher
description:
We’re hiring an experienced Graphic Designer and Photo Retoucher with real estate experience who understands how to create clean, professional, high-converting visuals across digital and print.



This role is for someone who knows how to design with clarity and purpose. You understand branding, layout, hierarchy, and how visuals influence attention and trust, especially in real estate marketing.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!

nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

Our core values are important, and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just managing marketing campaigns for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have real estate design experience and understand what makes listings visually credible and market-ready? Do you know how to design social posts and brochures that look clean, professional, and on-brand without overcomplicating them? Do you move fast when timelines are tight and still pay attention to spacing, alignment, and small details?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Social & Digital Design

- Design YouTube branding assets including thumbnails, banners, and episode graphics.

- Create Instagram listing posts, announcements, ads, and story graphics.

- Develop and maintain branded social templates for consistent output.



Print Design

- Experience preparing print-ready files

- Experience editing real estate photos

- Ability to work quickly without sacrificing quality

- Strong communication skills

- Ability to follow brand guidelines

- A stable, high-speed internet connection

- Growth mindset



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)

- Light motion graphics

- Understanding of social media performance metrics

- Basic copy awareness (headline spacing, readability, CTA placement)



NOTE: This is a project-based role with the opportunity to grow into a full-time position for the right person.



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.







STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $20-40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Graphic Designer with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: AI Automation Specialist (Voiceflow / Make.com)

title: Digital Content & Social Media Designer
description:
Employment Type: Full-time

Start: Immediate

Mon-Friday 9am-5pm AEST

Weekly Payment $220



The Role

We are looking for a commercially minded Digital Content & Social Media Designer to lead the creation of high-impact visual assets across ecommerce, paid media, social, wholesale, and retail channels. This role is essential in shaping how the brand appears digitally, blending compelling storytelling with performance-driven creative to drive online growth. You will collaborate closely with Marketing, Ecommerce, and Sales teams to deliver consistent, premium creative that strengthens brand identity while supporting ambitious growth targets.



Key Responsibilities



Brand & Campaign Creative

-Design seasonal campaign assets aligned with the brand's global brand direction.

-Develop digital-first creative for product launches, collaborations, and key trading 
nts.

-Ensure brand consistency across all touchpoints.



Ecommerce & Performance Creative

-Create high-converting assets for:

o Website banners and landing pages

o
 marketing campaigns

o Paid social and display ads

o Marketplace platforms

-Optimise creative based on performance insights and testing.



Social & Content

-Design organic and paid social assets across key platforms.

-Develop short-form motion graphics and video edits where required.

-Support content shoots with visual direction and post-production assets.



To Apply:

- Please share your most updated CV

- Answer the following questions in your application



1. Describe your experience creating high-impact digital assets across ecommerce, paid media, and social channels. What types of assets have you produced (website banners, landing pages,
 campaigns, paid social/display ads, marketplace content, etc.)? Share a specific campaign where your work supported a product launch, seasonal campaign, or key trading 
nt.



2. How do you approach designing performance-driven creative that drives online growth? What metrics (e.g., CTR, conversion rate, ROAS, AOV) do you consider when creating or optimising assets? Provide an example where you improved results through creative testing or optimisation.



3. How do you ensure brand consistency while delivering digital-first creative across website, social,
, wholesale, and retail channels? Include your experience with motion graphics, short-form video, and supporting content shoots (visual direction and post-production).

 marketing campaigns and automation.

title: Senior LinkedIn Outreach Specialist
description:
???? About Us



We are a U.S.-based digital marketing agency building structured LinkedIn outbound systems for B2B companies.



Our current focus is helping U.S.-based IT services and managed service providers (MSPs) generate predictable sales conversations with decision-makers.



We are hiring one mid-level to senior LinkedIn Outreach Specialist to operate and manage our outbound engine across multiple LinkedIn accounts.



This role directly impacts company revenue.



We are not hiring a generic VA.

We are hiring a disciplined operator who understands performance metrics.



Long-term growth opportunity available for high performers.



???? Your Mission



You will manage and execute LinkedIn outreach campaigns across 4 LinkedIn accounts targeting U.S.-based IT services owners and B2B decision-makers.



Your goal is not message volume.



Your goal is qualified sales conversations and booked discovery calls.



???? Core Responsibilities



• Build highly targeted U.S.-based prospect lists using LinkedIn Sales Navigator

• Maintain clean and accurate lead lists before upload

• Set up and manage outreach campaigns inside HeyReach (connection + follow-up sequences)

• Maintain safe daily activity limits (20–25 connection requests per account per day)

• Monitor inbox conversations daily inside HeyReach

• Respond using approved messaging frameworks

• Identify qualified prospects and escalate immediately

• Book discovery calls via Calendly

• Track KPIs inside Google Sheets / CRM

• Submit daily activity summary

• Submit weekly KPI performance report

• Immediately report any LinkedIn warnings or restrictions



???? Account Safety & Compliance



You must strictly follow:



• Gradual ramp-up procedures

• Daily activity limits

• No volume spikes

• No unapproved script changes

• Approved login workflow only



LinkedIn account safety is critical.



???? Performance Expectations (After Ramp-Up)



We measure:



• 25–35?ceptance rate

• 8–12% positive reply rate

• Qualified calls booked per week



We value precision, reporting discipline, and proactive improvement.



This role directly contributes to revenue generation.



???? Required Experience



• At least 6–12 months experience managing LinkedIn outreach campaigns

• Experience using HeyReach, Expandi, Dripify, or similar tools

• Strong understanding of B2B lead generation

• Experience working with U.S.-based clients

• Excellent written English

• Extremely detail-oriented



? Work Requirements



• Full-time position

• Must have at least 3–4 hours overlap with U.S. Eastern Time

• Stable internet connection

• Reliable daily communication



???? Compensation



$7.25 per hour based on experience.



A performance bonus is available based on the qualified calls booked.



Long-term growth opportunity into Outbound Team Lead for high performers.

title: Senior Laravel + Vue 3 (Inertia) Developer (Full-Time, Remote PH)
description:
About Us



We’re an Australian product team building two SaaS platforms: 

- Dogdom (a platform for dog owners and the dog showing community), and

- Membaroo (a membership and onboarding platform for organisations and clubs).



Both products share the same core tech stack: Laravel + Vue 3 (Inertia.js), hosted on Laravel Vapor (AWS Lambda).



We’re small, fast-moving, and we care a lot about clean, maintainable code and shipping meaningful product improvements consistently.



The Role



You’ll work across both Dogdom and Membaroo, building new features, improving existing workflows, and helping us scale our codebase and processes as the products grow.



Your day-to-day responsibilities include:

- Building features in Laravel + Vue 3 (Inertia.js)

- Writing clean, testable, maintainable code and submitting pull requests via GitHub

- Working from tasks in Linear (updates, comments, and estimates when needed)

- Communicating daily via Slack with the team

- Joining 3 short calls per fortnight (1 strategy call with the team, and 2 progress/review calls with CTO)

- Occasionally assisting with developer-level customer support (roughly 2 tickets per week)



What We’re Looking For



Must-have:

- Senior-level experience with Laravel + Vue 3 + Inertia.js

- Strong English communication (written and spoken)

- Comfortable working independently and managing your own time

- Confident with GitHub workflows (branches, PRs, reviews)

- Willing to maintain at least 2–3 hours overlap with Sydney business hours (AEST/AEDT)

- Experience working in a codebase where quality matters (tests, readability, predictable patterns)



Strongly preferred:

- Familiarity with Laravel Vapor and AWS

- You already use AI-assisted development tools in your workflow (for example Cursor, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, etc.) and can explain how you use them responsibly (not blindly copy/paste)



Nice to have (not required):

- Experience with Expo / React Native (future mobile app plans)



Compensation & Setup

- 75,000 PHP per month, paid reliably on time

- Full-time: 40 hours per week

- Long-term role — we’re hiring for stability, not short-term contracting

- Fully remote — work from anywhere in the Philippines

- You’ll be joining at a stage where your work will directly shape product direction and technical standards



Interview Process

1. Intro Call (15 minutes): A short call with our team to meet each other, confirm availability/timezone overlap, and make sure the role is a good fit on both sides.

2. Technical Interview (CTO): A deeper technical call with our CTO. We’ll work through a few programming challenges together and may include a small take-home assignment (if needed) to reflect real-world Laravel + Inertia work.

3. Final Call (Offer & Details): A final conversation to confirm salary expectations, start date, work setup, and any remaining questions before we move forward.



How to Apply



Please send:

- Your resume/CV

- A short intro in English covering your Laravel + Vue + Inertia experience (what you’ve built and what you owned), any Vapor/AWS experience, and your current AI workflow (for example Cursor): how you use it day-to-day

- A link to your GitHub profile or portfolio (if available), ideally with examples that overlap with our tech stack

title: Video Editor
description:
Work from Home

Salary: Php
/hr (project basis)



*If this sounds just like you, please complete our application form to apply for the position.







About the Role

Pulso World is looking for a Vlog Video Editor who can turn raw, real-world footage into fast-paced, culturally relevant, visually engaging vlogs. From lifestyle segments to street culture features, travel diaries, behind-the-scenes shoots, and creator collaborations—you will shape the visual identity of Pulso’s vlog content across social media.



Key Responsibilities

1. Vlog Editing & Storytelling

Edit engaging, personality-driven vlogs with strong pacing and narrative flow.

Build emotion, humor, and rhythm through cuts, transitions, and music.

Select the most dynamic, expressive shots that capture Pulso’s tone and culture.

Turn chaotic raw footage into clean, cohesive, high-retention stories.



2. Short-Form & Social Content

Create cutdowns, teasers, and vertical clips (Reels, Shorts, TikTok) from vlog shoots.

Add captions, punchlines, and social-friendly text graphics.

Craft strong hooks in the first 1–3 seconds for maximum engagement.



3. Visual Enhancements

Add B-roll, overlays, motion text, 
s, sound effects, and stylistic flair.

Perform basic color correction and audio cleanup.

Apply graphic elements aligned with Pulso branding.



4. Creative Collaboration

Work with producers, shooters, hosts, and the social media team.

Pitch creative editing ideas, transitions, 
 inserts, and narrative angles.

Follow deadlines and deliver multiple edits per week.



5. File & Workflow Management

Organize project folders, assets, and timelines.

Maintain proper naming conventions and backup systems.

Deliver versions optimized for all platforms.



Qualifications

Excellent command of Adobe Premiere Pro (After Effects is a plus).

Strong sense of pacing, humor, culture, and visual rhythm.

Ability to edit fast while maintaining high quality.

Strong storytelling instincts and attention to detail.

Familiarity with current trends, 
 culture, and youth content.



Preferred Skills (Bonus)

Experience shooting vlogs or understanding vlog camera setups.

Familiarity with Filipino pop culture, street culture, and lifestyle niches.

Knowledge of analytics-driven editing (retention, hook strategy).

title: Reddit Assistant
description:
We’re hiring people to manage daily activity on Reddit, including posting content and interacting within communities. This is ongoing work and requires someone who actually understands how Reddit functions, not just how to scroll it.



You’ll need atleast 3+ devices (Android only). If you own multiple devices, that’s a plus and allows you to earn more. Expect roughly one hour of work per device each day.



Each day you’ll post content across several subreddits.



A critical part of this role is reading the room. The videos we provide can range from humorous to emotional to awkward or uncomfortable. You need to instantly recognize the tone and write posts that feel natural for that type of content. If you post everything the same way, you’ll fail.



You’ll also be responsible for finding appropriate subreddits for each video. That means reviewing community rules, understanding what performs well there, and making sure your post doesn’t look forced or out of place. If you can’t do that consistently, this position isn’t for you.



We’re looking for people who think independently, adapt fast, and don’t need their hand held. Prior Reddit experience is helpful but not mandatory if you learn quickly.



This is a long-term opportunity for dependable workers. Compensation is solid and can increase based on results and how many devices you use.



Earnings:

Most contributors earn $100–$500 per month, depending on consistency and the number of devices used.



Time Commitment:

Daily time commitment ranges from about 1 to 5 hours, depending on how many devices you’re using



To apply, include:

• how many devices you can work with

• your experience using Reddit

• when you’re available each day

title: Senior SEO Specialist
description:
Make sure you read this in full before applying:



Let me guess... You're the sharpest SEO mind in the room. But you're suffocating.



You're tired of presenting killer audit findings that get buried in a developer's "backlog." You’re tired of keyword-stuffed nonsense, begging for tool budgets, and explaining a 301 redirect to your boss for the tenth time.



This isn't just another job post. This is your exit strategy.



We’re not offering you a new title. We’re offering you a war room, an arsenal, and the targets to prove how good you really are.



Who Are We?

My name is Jim Ng. I built this agency on one principle: get clients tangible results, or get out of the way. 

In just a year, we've delivered for over 50 businesses. Now, we have a clear, audacious mission: to 10x our revenue in the next 12 months.



This isn’t a "hope and pray" strategy. It’s a battle plan. We need elite "Digital Warriors" who don't just "do SEO"—they command the search results.



The Stakes: We Put Our Skin in the Game

We don’t hide behind "SEO takes time" excuses. We offer our clients iron-clad guarantees:



- 10% of targeted keywords on Page 1 in 3 months.

- 30% of targeted keywords on Page 1 in 6 months.

- 60% of targeted keywords on Page 1 in 12 months.



Does this scare you, or does it excite you? If your first thought is "That's impossible," keep scrolling. If your first thought is "With my strategy and AI-driven efficiency, I can crush those numbers," then you’re the sniper we want.



What You’ll Actually Be Doing (The Blueprint)

- Architect of Success: You won't just advise on site structure; you’ll build the SEO Bible for our clients. You have the authority to see changes implemented.

- AI Command & Control: You use AI models not as a crutch, but as an exoskeleton. You engineer complex prompts to automate audits, generate schema at scale, and dismantle competitor strategies piece by piece.

- The Sherlock Holmes of Search: You conduct deep-dive technical, content, and backlink audits. You find the opportunities that Screaming Frog and Ahrefs miss because you know how to look beneath the data.

- Translate Data into Dollars: You live in GA4 and Search Console. You ignore vanity metrics. Your focus is singular: qualified organic traffic that drives business growth.



The Specialist’s Code (Is This You?)

- Growth & Mastery: You have 3+ years in the trenches. You see a Google Update as an opportunity to leapfrog the competition, not a crisis.

- Technical Dominance: You speak "developer." You understand CMS limitations, cloud hosting, and how to work with technical teams to get it right the first time.

- AI Power User: You are well-adept in prompt engineering. You know how to use AI to 10x your own output and accuracy.

- Future Leader: You want to be in a commanding position. You aren't looking for a job to hide in; you're looking for a platform to lead and eventually run your own pod.



The Real Pay-Off

- Unleashed Autonomy: You get the freedom to test, experiment, and implement. This is your domain to master.

- Remote Warfare: This is a 100% remote role. We care about the traffic graph moving up and to the right, not what chair you sit in.

- No Nightmare Clients: We protect our warriors. If a client won't implement your expert recommendations, we fire them.

- Empire Building: You are part of the core team. Your successes will be highly visible and critical to our 10x mission.



Ready to Enlist? Here’s where you can apply:





Nothing else will be entertained.

title: Digital Ecommerce Coordinator
description:
Employment Type: Full-time

Start: Immediate

Working Hours: Monday–Friday, 9am–5pm AEST

Salary: $240 per week



Role Overview



We are seeking a commercially minded Digital Ecommerce Coordinator to manage the day-to-day operations, optimisation, and growth of a premium footwear ecommerce platform.



This role is responsible for delivering a high-quality online brand experience that reflects heritage craftsmanship and global positioning. Working closely with Marketing, Wholesale, and Operations teams, you will drive online sales performance while ensuring strong brand execution across all digital channels.



Key Responsibilities:



Ecommerce Operations & Trading

Manage and update the ecommerce site (product uploads, pricing, imagery, merchandising).

Execute seasonal product launches aligned with global brand direction.

Ensure product storytelling reflects premium brand positioning.

Monitor inventory levels in collaboration with Operations to optimise stock availability.

Coordinate online promotions, markdown strategies, and trading calendars.

Maintain site hygiene including navigation, filters, collections, and landing pages.



Performance & Reporting

Monitor key KPIs including revenue, traffic, conversion rate, AOV, sell-through, and stock turn.

Prepare weekly and monthly performance reports with commercial insights.

Analyse customer behaviour and identify UX and conversion improvement opportunities.

Support forecasting and promotional planning with data-backed insights.



Digital Marketing & Growth Support

Support EDM campaign execution including segmentation, testing, and performance analysis.

Coordinate paid media assets (Meta, Google) in line with brand campaigns.

Assist with SEO optimisation including metadata, product descriptions, and on-site content.

Manage homepage banners and campaign landing pages aligned with seasonal storytelling.



Customer Experience & Brand Execution

Ensure the online customer journey reflects premium positioning.

Monitor customer feedback and collaborate with Customer Service to resolve friction points.

Support loyalty and retention initiatives to drive repeat purchase.

Ensure all digital content reflects brand tone, product craftsmanship, and quality standards.



Skills & Experience

2–4 years’ experience in ecommerce or digital marketing (fashion or footwear preferred).

Experience managing ecommerce platforms (Shopify preferred).

Strong understanding of ecommerce analytics (Google Analytics, platform reporting).

Experience with
 marketing platforms (Klaviyo, Mailchimp, or similar).

Commercially minded with strong analytical capability.

High attention to detail and strong organisational skills.

Ability to manage multiple seasonal deadlines in a fast-paced retail environment.



Desirable

Experience within premium or heritage fashion brands.

Understanding of wholesale and DTC channel strategy.

Knowledge of footwear sizing, merchandising, and stock management.

Basic HTML/CSS knowledge.



Key Attributes

Brand-aware and commercially driven

Strong execution capability with attention to detail

Data-driven decision maker

Collaborative and proactive

Passion for premium footwear and brand storytelling



To Apply:

- Please share your most updated CV

- Answer the following questions in your application



1. Describe your experience managing an ecommerce site (Shopify preferred). What were your responsibilities (product uploads, merchandising, launches, promotions, reporting)? Share one example where you improved sales or conversion rate.



2. What ecommerce KPIs do you regularly monitor (e.g., revenue, conversion rate, AOV, sell-through, stock turn)? Explain how you’ve used data to inform trading, promotional, or merchandising decisions. Provide a brief example.



3. Describe your experience supporting digital marketing initiatives (EDMs, paid media assets, SEO, homepage banners, landing pages). How do you ensure campaigns align with brand positioning while driving performance?

title: video editor, specialising on lead gen short videos
description:
We are hiring a high-performance Video Creative Editor (20 hours per week, 1-month paid trial with strong potential for full-time growth). Your role is not to “just edit videos”  your job is to produce high-volume, conversion-focused vertical ad creatives for our window replacement lead generation campaigns. You will be expected to deliver 3–5 completed ad videos per day (20–45 seconds, 9:16 format) with powerful 3-second hooks, clean and engaging subtitles, strong pacing, pattern interrupts, and messaging built specifically for paid traffic on Meta and TikTok. These creatives will target homeowners and focus on strong emotional and financial triggers such as high energy bills, drafty rooms, outdated windows, noise reduction, storm damage, home value, and financing offers. We provide core scripts, proven angles, and access to competitive spy tools so you can research winning ads and model what is already working in the market. You must be able to create multiple hook variations, adapt messaging slightly for testing, stay highly organised, and move fast. This is a production-focused role with clear daily output expectations, we handle uploading and optimisation, but the right candidate will grow into a long-term embedded tea
mber as we expand into additional high-ticket home service niches. We are looking for someone competitive, detail-oriented, and serious about building inside a performance-driven team.



???? Non-Negotiables (Please Do Not Apply If…)



You cannot produce 3–5 vertical ad creatives per day consistently.



You do not understand that the first 3 seconds (the hook) determines performance.



You have only edited YouTube/vlog content and not short-form paid ads.



You are slow with revisions or need constant reminders.



You are disorganised with file naming and folder structure.



You are uncomfortable working with performance targets and deadlines.



You do not take feedback well or cannot adjust quickly.



? What Winning Looks Like



Clean, high-retention edits with strong hooks.



Fast turnaround (same-day delivery).



Clear organisation of files.



Proactive suggestions based on spy tool research.



Consistent output without being chased.



Improvement in creative quality week by week.





Thank you for reading, we look forward to hearing from you soon.

title: Senior Backend Engineer  (Supabase / Postgres / AI) - Founding Team
description:
Hi there!

We’re building a new networking platform for startup founders, operators, and entrepreneurs.

We’re hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to design and own the core backend from the ground up — database architecture, AI matchmaking, security, and scalability.

This is a founding role with real owner ship and long-term architectural influence.



WHAT YOU'LL DO: 

- Design scalable relational database architecture (Postgres)

- Define clean, long-term data models and indexing strategies

- Build AI matchmaking using pgvector + embeddings

- Implement secure authentication & Row-Level Security (Supabase)

- Ensure performance, privacy, and system integrity from day one

- Help define backend standards as we scale



We are building carefully, not recklessly. Long-term architecture matters here.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

- Strong real-world SQL & Postgres experience

- Experience architecting production backend systems

- Deep understanding of relational data modelling

- Security-conscious, systems-oriented mindset

- Comfortable designing systems independently

- Must have a stable internet connection

- Preferably based in Manila

This role is best suited for engineers who enjoy building core systems — not just implementing tickets.



WORKING HOURS

- Filipino daylight hours (approx. 8am–5pm PH time)

- Some flexibility required to overlap with early UK time

- Full-time role

- Growth Path: Founding-level ownership, direct collaboration with the CTO, and long-term career growth



HOW TO APPLY

Send:

- Your resume

- A short message explaining a backend system you designed and why you’re proud of it

 “What would you prioritize when designing a scalable backend from zero?”

: [your
 here]

Subject: "Senior Backend Engineer – [Your Name]"



If you want ownership, architectural influence, and to build something meaningful from day one — we’d love to hear from you.

Apply today and start building your future with Sun Life of Canada (Philippines), Inc.
