title: Meta / Facebook Ads Assistant
description:
I run a UK web design business and I’m looking for a reliable, organised, and cost-effective person to help with Meta /
 Ads.



The main goal is to generate more enquiries and sales for my website services. I want someone who understands Meta Ads well, is switched on, communicates clearly, and is interested in building something long term if we work well together.



I want to stay heavily involved in the process, so this is a collaborative role. We’ll review campaigns together, analyse data, test ideas, improve creatives, and work on getting better results over time. I also want to keep learning Meta Ads properly in the process, so I value someone who can explain their thinking clearly.



I have already spent around £800 on ads, so there is some existing data to review. Over the next couple of weeks, I’m also preparing more creative assets including video testimonials, social proof, and fresh ad content.



I’m also well connected in this space. I share an office with someone who has been running
 Ads for around 4 years and is currently doing around £20k/month in revenue largely through
 Ads. I also have another experienced contact who is strong with Meta Ads. They won’t be managing campaigns directly, but I can get additional feedback and ideas from them, which can help us improve performance and keep learning.



This could become a long-term opportunity for the right person. If things go well, there may also be future work helping with campaigns for my clients too, mainly UK trade and service businesses such as roofers, plumbers, and similar companies.



What I’m looking for:



Solid experience with Meta /
 Ads



Good communication and decent English



Honest, dependable, and organised



Willing to work collaboratively and review performance regularly



Open to learning, testing, and improving over time



Ideally within a budget of around $5/hour



You do not need to have lots of direct experience in UK trade business lead generation specifically, as long as you have a strong understanding of Meta Ads and can apply your skills well. If you do have experience with lead generation or UK businesses, that is a bonus.



Bonus if you can also help with:



Basic video editing or creative support

This is helpful, but not essential.



Please apply with:



Your Meta Ads experience



What types of campaigns or businesses you have worked on



Any results or wins you have helped achieve



Your hourly rate



Whether you are comfortable reviewing campaigns together on calls



Start your proposal with “Blue Ladder” so I know you read the post properly



I’m looking for someone with the right attitude, good communication, strong effort, and real interest in doing good work. If you’re skilled, reliable, and want to grow with the opportunity, I’d be glad to hear from you.

title: Engineering Manager (Delivery & Execution)
description:
We are seeking an Engineering manager who can own predictable delivery across engineering by enforcing sprint discipline, decision clarity, and execution standards. Reduce coordination cost, eliminate rework, and ensure that engineering output is reviewable, shippable, and on time.



Core Responsibilities



Sprint Ownership & Delivery Control

• Own sprint planning, execution, and closure

• Enforce sprint scope boundaries (no silent mid-sprint additions)

• Ensure all tickets entering a sprint meet Definition of Ready

• Track and act on: ticket aging, spillover, churn, blocked work

• Move tickets aggressively across states (TODO ? IN PROGRESS ? REVIEW ? DONE)

• Kill zombie tickets



Timebox Enforcement

• Treat timeboxes as coordination contracts, not estimates

• Require proactive communication before a timebox slips

• Block review if timebox standards are violated

• Escalate early, not after the fact



Execution Quality Gates

• Enforce: Definition of Ready (before sprint), Definition of Done (before release)

• Reject work that: contains implicit decisions, lacks acceptance criteria, introduces duplication without approval

• Ensure code review happens before QA

• Ensure QA does not compensate for missing engineering clarity



Decision Discipline (in partnership with TPM / Product)

• Require explicit tracking of: Open Decisions, Frozen Decisions

• Block execution on unresolved architectural decisions

• Ensure decisions are made by the right group, at the right time

• Prevent “decision by implementation”



5. Engineering Standards Enforcement

• Enforce agreed standards consistently: no duplication without approval, no implicit architecture decisions, no skipping ticket states

• Treat violations as delivery risk, not personal issues

• Track repeat violations and escalate



Required Skills & Traits



Must Have

• Strong judgment around delivery tradeoffs

• Comfort enforcing rules and saying “no”

• Ability to stop work and force alignment

• Low tolerance for ambiguity in execution

• Bias for early escalation over late heroics

• Calm under pressure, emotionally neutral

• Experience running sprints that actually ship

• Strong English language skills

• Familiarity with Jira-style workflows



Nice to Have

• Background as senior engineer

• Experience in SaaS / platform teams

• Worked alongside TPMs or Product Managers

title: Product Manager (Technical) / Software Architect
description:
We are seeking a Technical Product Manager / Architect who bridges product design and engineering execution. This role combines system-level thinking, architectural oversight, and clear, actionable documentation—producing deliverables engineers can build from directly. The ideal candidate can translate business needs into architecture diagrams, wireframes, and well-scoped tickets with code-level precision, ensuring efficient handoff and reduced rework.



Requirements & Documentation

• Author architecture-aware product specifications including system diagrams, logic flows, and key technical dependencies.

• Prepare engineer-ready tickets, including pseudocode, scaffolding, or sample API structures.

• Conduct architecture and code reviews, identifying potential design or implementation issues early.

• Build wireframes, mockups, and interaction flows using Figma or equivalent tools to align engineering and UX/UI early in the cycle.

• Collaborate with engineering to ensure technical feasibility and architectural scalability before feature commitment.

Cross-Functional Execution

• Work closely with engineering leads to break down architecture into structured deliverables and sprint-ready tasks.

• Lead technical review sessions to validate assumptions and architecture decisions before coding begins.



Qualifications

• Strong understanding of software architecture principles, REST APIs, and modular system design.

• Hands-on experience writing or reviewing code in PHP, JavaScript, and SQL preferred.

• Proficiency in creating wireframes, prototypes, and UI flows that accurately reflect data and system constraints.

• Ability to evaluate trade-offs between architectural purity, delivery speed, and scalability.

• Prior experience functioning as a bridge between engineering and design, ensuring clarity and readiness for execution.

title: HIGH PAY GRC IT ANALYST & AI Real-Time Rendering Specialist
description:
The Opportunity

We are looking for a rare "Hybrid" talent—someone who is deeply knowledgeable in IT Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) and simultaneously proficient in Live AI Video Rendering.



This is a confidential project where you will act as a Technical Proxy in live, camera-on interviews for GRC Analyst roles. You will be using my identity and voice via real-time AI tools. If you are a tech wizard who knows how to navigate a NIST framework while managing a GPU-heavy AI stream, this is for you.



The Role

Technical Proxy: Represent the identity in live video interviews using real-time AI video-mirroring and voice conversion.



GRC Subject Matter Expert: Answer complex technical questions regarding ISO 27001, NIST, SOC2, HIPAA, and AI Risk Management.



AI Operator: Manage real-time AI tools (DeepFaceLive, RVC, or similar) with zero-to-minimal latency.



Technical Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

GRC Expertise: You must be well-versed in Risk Assessments, Gap Analysis, Vendor Risk Management, and Compliance Auditing and Demonstrate mastery of GRC frameworks (ISO 27001, NIST, SOC2, HIPAA, AI Risk).



AI Proficiency: Expert-level knowledge of real-time face-swapping and RVC (Retrieval-based Voice Conversion) tools.



Hardware: You must have access to a PC with a high-end GPU (NVIDIA RTX 30-series or 40-series) OR the proven ability to set up and stream via a Cloud GPU (RunPod, Vast.ai, etc.).



Compensation & Future Growth

Per Interview Session: $10 USD per session (45–60 mins).



Success Bonus: $1,000 USD  paid immediately upon a successful hire.



Volume: We are looking to fill two positions, meaning a potential for $2,000 USD in bonuses for the right candidate.



Future Work: Upon successful completion of these placements, we will move into a long-term partnership. You will be retained for future AI and GRC technical work at highly competitive, negotiated rates.



How to Apply

To be considered, please provide the following:



The word GRC 



A copy of your resume



Experience: A brief summary of your experience with GRC frameworks.



Hardware: Confirm your PC specs (GPU/CPU) or access you have or describe your experience using Cloud GPU rentals for live streaming.



Voice Sample: Attach a short audio recording of you speaking in English (Professional/Corporate tone).



AI Demo (Optional but highly preferred): A 15-second clip of a real-time face-swap you have executed.

title: TRADER

You pass a straightforward evaluation/challenge ? get funded ? trade live markets with big size ? withdraw your share weekly/bi-weekly.

The better you perform (consistent profits, solid risk management), the faster we scale your account size and payout percentage.

This is not "learning" or "hobby trading" — it's a high-reward setup for traders who can produce real, repeatable gains.

80–90% profit share (industry-leading splits).

No personal capital at risk beyond a small evaluation fee (which we can discuss reimbursement for top performers).

Scaling plan: Hit targets ? unlock larger accounts ? earn more.

Support: Strategy feedback, risk rule optimization, community for serious traders only.



Who We're Looking For (Kar Odakl? Traders)Proven track record: Consistent profitability over months (show statements, Myfxbook, or prop payouts).

Strong discipline: Respect drawdown rules, no revenge trading, focus on high-probability setups.

Independent & motivated: You treat this like a business — profit is the only KPI.

Experience with prop challenges/funded accounts is a big plus (but not mandatory if you can prove edge).



If you're tired of grinding small personal accounts and ready to trade serious size for serious money, DM me with:Your trading style/markets

Recent performance proof

Why you think you'd crush it in a funded setup



Serious inquiries only — we're building a small, high-performing crew focused on one thing: stacking profits.

title: Business Operations, Data and Financial Analyst
description:
We are a growing Australian healthcare and NDIS disability services group operating residential care, home care, respite and staffing services. Labour is our largest cost and service delivery is our biggest revenue driver — so understanding our numbers is critical. 



We are looking for a highly analytical Business Operations & Data Analyst to help us build visibility across revenue, labour cost, occupancy, and profitability.



This is NOT a data entry role and not a general virtual assistant role. We are looking for someone who enjoys working with numbers, building dashboards, and helping leadership make better decisions. 



Responsibilities



You will work directly with the business owner and senior managers to build and maintain operational reports, visualisations and dashboards and be responsible for extracting data, interpreting, visualising and then presenting to the team.



We need someone that can make the complicated uncomplicated and easy to understand, has a commercial focus, and can communicate clearly and visualise data and set goals. From the data, you will set goals. 



For example - someone that can come in, take a look at the cost of us sending work to agency, analyse the cost of our own staff, and then visualise the dollar figure of lost revenue last week/fortnight on agency cost. 



Your work will include:



- Overtime reporting including hours, dollar value, reason analysis and interpreting further (eg. x% of overtime was avoidable)

- Agency spend tracking

- Labour cost per service line (taking into account all of our expenses and determining the actual cost of hours sold)

- Bed occupancy %

- Care minutes invoiced vs paid

- Hours delivered by funding source and building breakeven points (eg. x hours sold to x organisation for breakeven)

- Setting goals for rostering staff to visualise how many hours need to be sold to increase revenue etc

- Breakeven modelling

- Building structured Excel or dashboards

- Presenting and developing clear summaries and reports with visualisations and charts for management to review 

- Setting KPIs and targets for staff based on data



(Our director runs a number of businesses and may request your assistance with other businesses for similar tasks also)



What we are looking for



- 4 years + experience in financial analysis, management reporting and operations analytics

- High proficient in excel (pivot tables, advanced formulas, dashboards)

- Understand labour-based businesses

- Be comfortable working with messy data and improving structure

- Be comfortable working with undeveloped systems and assisting to implement systems through your work 

- Be a strong, confident communicator that is highly experienced in your field

- Be able to provide examples of past work

- Ideally, someone with experience in an Australian market in the NDIS space 



The systems we currently use are Xero, Shiftcare, and Employment Hero, where most data will be kept. 



This is NOT a virtual assistant, data entry or social media role. This is an analytical, commercially focused role.



To apply, please
 us with your resume, a description of your past relative work, and attach a sample dashboard or report that you have created in the past.

title: Experienced Video Editor (YouTube, Course, & Social Media) From Craft to Cash™
description:
Part-Time With Immediate Start | Fast Track to Full-Time if interested. 

From Craft to Cash™



Please read this entire posting before applying.



We are only looking for a great fit to join our growing design team. 



From Craft to Cash™ is expanding, and we are adding a new editor to our growing design and editing team. This position starts immediately.



From Craft to Cash™ is a fast-growing education and media brand serving crafters and creative entrepreneurs who want to Make, Market, and Monetize their skills. We produce a high volume of educational, inspirational, and strategic content across YouTube and multiple social platforms.



We are not hiring a basic editor.

We are hiring someone who understands storytelling, retention, structure, pacing, and how content drives community and sales.



If you love YouTube, understand platform growth, and know how to turn raw footage into high-retention content that keeps people watching, this role is for you.



???? Primary Role

YouTube & Long-Form Content Editing



You will edit:



• Weekly YouTube videos

• Educational trainings and masterclasses

• Podcast-style conversations

• Personality-driven leadership content

• Live event footage

• Course recordings for From Craft to Cash™



Your edits must:



• Maintain strong audience retention

• Use compelling hooks and strategic intros

• Incorporate jump cuts intentionally

• Add captions, overlays, and motion graphics

• Include dynamic B-roll

• Use sound design and pacing strategically

• Elevate the authority and personality of From Craft to Cash™



You must understand YouTube structure and viewer psychology, not just editing mechanics.



???? Short-Form Repurposing



You will:



• Repurpose long-form content into Instagram Reels

• Create YouTube Shorts

• Edit TikTok clips

• Prepare
-ready vertical videos



You must know how to adjust pacing and style per platform.



???? Backend & Content Support



Because From Craft to Cash™ produces a high volume of content, organization and systems are critical.



This role may include:



• Uploading and scheduling YouTube videos

• Formatting descriptions, timestamps, and pinned comments

• Assisting with YouTube optimization

• Organizing raw footage and project files

• Supporting batching workflows

• Reviewing scheduled posts for quality control

• Assisting with content repurposing systems & other content channels



Experience with scheduling platforms and YouTube/Social Media backend management is highly valued.



???? Brand-Aligned Creative Execution



You must be able to:



• Maintain consistent brand aesthetics

• Understand bold, polished, authority-driven visuals

• Suggest improvements to hooks and retention

• Add special effects that enhance content without distracting

• Execute direction at a high level independently



We move fast. You must be able to keep up without sacrificing excellence.



? Required Qualifications



• Proven YouTube editing experience with portfolio

• Strong experience in Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro

• Clear understanding of retention-focused editing

• Strong attention to detail

• Professional communication

• Reliable turnaround times

• Pride in producing high-quality work



You must be dependable. From Craft to Cash™ operates with consistency and excellence.



???? Highly Valued Bonus Skills



• Experience uploading and optimizing YouTube videos

• Understanding of YouTube SEO and analytics

• Thumbnail creation

• Motion graphics and animation

• Special effects editing

• Professional color grading and audio mixing

• Experience editing for coaches, educators, or online brands

• Social media scheduling experience

• Ability to quality-check and manage content pipelines

• Understanding of YouTube growth strategy



If you understand retention curves and how content converts to revenue, that is a major plus.



???? Growth Opportunity



This role starts part-time and immediately.



The right person will grow into:



• Full-time editor for From Craft to Cash™

• YouTube growth support lead

• Campaign and launch content editor

• Event content director



We are building long-term.



???? What We Offer



• Immediate start

• Consistent workload

• Clear communication

• Creative input opportunities

• Long-term growth path

• Opportunity to directly impact the expansion of From Craft to Cash™



You will work closely with a founder who produces at a high level and expects excellence.



???? How to Apply



Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



Submit:



Your resume



Your portfolio with real YouTube examples



Links to videos that demonstrate strong retention and pacing



A short written or video response answering:



• What is your favorite YouTube channel and why

• What editing style do you specialize in

• What is your turnaround time for a 10 to 15-minute video

• Have you ever uploaded or optimized a YouTube video

• Have you scheduled content across platforms before



Optional but encouraged:



• Share a thumbnail you designed

• Share analytics from a video you edited

• Share an example where you improved audience retention



We are looking for excellence, reliability, and alignment with the vision of From Craft to Cash™.



If that is you, apply today.

ob description

Experience with TikTok Shop backend operations is a plus, but the core of this role is affiliate growth and performance management.

Opportunity to grow within a fast-scaling TikTok-focused agency.

Creative, collaborative, and supportive team culture.

 handling and phone handling

title: USA SALES BOOKING AGENT FOR EST CALLING TIMES 3/2
description:
USD $500 starting salary per month plus commission of 1% of the the complete closing of the sale (average sale is $2000), paid on the 1st and 15th of every month(PST). We book an average of 10-20 shows per month.

If I need to close the sale completely, then you will get .5% commission for that lead. Commisions will be paid after the event takes place during that scheduled pay day.



PLEASE REVIEW MY MALE DANCE TOURING BUSINESS, 
 and if this is of interest PLEASE ANSWER MY 4 QUESTIONS below.



You MUST ANSWER the 4 questions in order to be considered.



QUESTION 1: WHAT IS YOUR ENGLISH SPEAKING CAPABILITY?

We are looking for people that have an english speaking capability on a scale of 1-10.

YOU MUST BE BETWEEN 9-10.

AGAIN, WHAT IS YOUR ENGLISH SPEAKING CAPABILITY?



QUESTION 2: DID YOU REVIEW THE WEBSITE ABOVE? You will be asked questions about our business.



Initial training/onboarding period (first 2 weeks):

To help you ease into the role and allow us to assess how we work together, we’ll start you at half the regular hours as follows:



Tuesday to Saturday: 4:00 AM – 8:00 AM PHT

 Corresponding to 3:00 PM – 7:00 PM EST (Mon–Fri)

Sunday: 7:00 AM – 10:00 AM PHT

 Corresponding to 6:00 PM – 9:00 PM EST (Sat)



After the 2-week period, assuming everything goes well, you’ll transition to the full-time schedule outlined below.



Full-time schedule (after the initial period):

Tuesday to Saturday: 12:00 AM – 8:00 AM PHT

Sunday: 4:00 AM – 10:00 AM PHT



This corresponds to the following times in US Eastern Standard Time (EST):

Monday to Friday: 11:00 AM – 7:00 PM EST

Saturday: 3:00 PM – 9:00 PM EST



QUESTION 3: Are you good with these hours?



I am looking for a long term, full time booking agent that will book our shows at bars, nightclubs and casinos in different states. You will gather leads by google searching for bars and nightclubs



Our workflow relies heavily on Google Workspace tools:

Google Sheets is used daily as a shared tracker for gathering and managing leads (bars/nightclubs we’re researching/touring), including columns for names, addresses, contacts, notes, status, etc.

We also use Google Docs for contracts, Google Drive for organizing and searching files, and Google Calendar for scheduling.

No advanced expertise is required—just solid familiarity so you can jump in quickly and keep things organized.



QUESTION 4: Do you have solid familiarity with Google Workspace tools?



We will train you with our sales script.

Must have a laptop or desktop AND preferably an Iphone with Icloud calendar. BUT an android will do. Also MUST have a headset WITH NOISE CANCELLATION.



GOOD LUCK!

title: Graphical Assistant

title: Full-Stack Developer
description:
POSITION DESCRIPTION – Full-Stack Developer (Python + React)



Role Type: Mid–Senior Full-Stack Developer

Tech Stack: Python (backend), React (frontend), Linux, Docker

Reports To: Technology Lead / Operations Lead



Role Overview



We are looking for two experienced full-stack developers who can take loosely defined business objectives, ask the right clarifying questions, and independently deliver clean, production-ready solutions. These roles require strong problem-solving ability, confidence in managing ambiguity, and the capability to deliver end-to-end outcomes across integration, automation, and application development.



Example Projects You Will Work On



Online signup and customer onboarding systems



Service provisioning automation with an internal admin dashboard



Lead routing, SMS/email workflows, and customer-journey nurturing



Customer Portal redevelopment (billing, service tools, authentication)



Customer mobile app redevelopment (iOS & Android)



End-to-end workflow automation using APIs, scraping, and integrations



Code repository management, CI/CD pipelines, Dockerised deployments





Key Responsibilities



Deliver project-based work from requirements clarification through to production.



Work with stakeholders to understand business needs and define technical requirements.



Design, build, and test backend APIs, integrations, and automations in Python.



Develop front-end components and applications using React (JavaScript/TypeScript).



Implement UI designs into functional, user-friendly interfaces.



Collaborate with other developers and internal teams across multi-discipline projects.



Work with the DBA on data models, pipelines, and efficient SQL usage.



Deploy and maintain applications in a Linux + Docker (on-prem) environment.



Use GitHub and standard version control practices for all development work.





Required Technical Skills



Backend



Strong experience consuming and integrating third-party APIs.



HTTP web-scraping with BeautifulSoup, Scrapy, Selenium, or Playwright.



Building automation workflows using APIs + web-scraping logic.



SQL proficiency across Postgres, MariaDB, or MySQL.



Linux fundamentals (bash, cron, SSH, CLI).



Docker (building Dockerfiles, creating images, deploying containers).



Frontend



Strong React development (JavaScript + TypeScript).



Solid HTML/CSS for implementing UI designs.



Core Knowledge



OAuth and general authentication flows.



SQL basics including aggregates, CTEs, window functions.



Comfortable working within Linux/Docker-based development and deployment environments.





Nice to Have (Not Required)



Experience with Entra OAuth.



Power Platform Component Framework (PCF).



Webserver configuration (Apache, Nginx).



Sysadmin experience (Linux).



Networking/security awareness (OWASP Top-10, firewalls, CDNs like Cloudflare/Fastly).



Graphic design skills or UI polishing ability.



Experience with Microsoft Dynamics 365 CE or BC.





Ideal Candidate Profile



4–7+ years full-stack development experience.



End-to-end ownership mindset — gathers requirements, proposes solutions, delivers outcomes.



Strong communication skills; comfortable asking clarifying questions and managing stakeholders.



Enjoys working on varied projects across automation, apps, integrations, and system build-outs.



Thrives in a small, collaborative, fast-moving environment.

title: Part-Time Social Media Manager

Social Media Manager (Part-Time)

title: Facebook Ads Marketing TRAINER
description:
We are seeking an experienced
 (Meta) Ads Marketing Expert to TRAIN and develop Virtual Assistants into capable, independent, and performance-driven
 Ads specialists. The OBJECTIVE is to build, train, and mentor a remote team that can execute and optimize lead generation campaigns at a high level.

The ideal candidate is both a strong media buyer and an effective teacher who can translate strategy into structured training systems.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

• Design and implement a structured
 Ads training curriculum

• Develop step-by-step SOPs, training manuals, and video walkthroughs

• Train VAs on campaign setup, targeting, retargeting, and scaling strategies

• Teach performance metrics analysis (CPL, CPA, conversion rate, ROI)

• Conduct live campaign reviews and coaching sessions

• Oversee Meta Pixel, Conversion API, and event tracking education

• Establish testing frameworks for structured A/B experimentation

• Monitor VA performance and provide skill assessments and feedback

• Ensure compliance with Meta policies

• Build a scalable internal media buying team capable of managing campaigns independently





REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS ARE:

• Minimum 7 years of hands-on
/Meta Ads experience

• Proven track record in lead generation campaigns (not ecommerce-only)

• Prior experience in training or mentoring junior media buyers or marketing teams

• Strong analytical skills and ability to explain data clearly

• Ability to build structured systems, documentation, and repeatable processes

• Experience in regulated industries (insurance, healthcare, finance) preferred





TEMP WORK SCHEDULE:

Work schedule is temporary AND part-time schedule, working 4-5 hours per day for 5 days a week.

Days and Hours to work are Monday to Friday from 3:30pm to 7:30pm MST Arizona time.





COMPENSATION:

Compensation is made up of 2 parts.

1st Part = $8 dlls per Hour during training sessions

2nd Part = $250 or $600 Bonuses dependent on teams' development and FB Ads campaign performances.





HOW TO APPLY:

1. IMPORTANTLY meet ALL required Experience & Qualifications

2. Download FREE "Whatsapp" app to cell

3.
 your resume to 
 AND include your "Whatsapp Cell #

title: Airbnb & Property Management Rockstar | OwnerRez Expert (PST Shift)
description:
Are you an Airbnb Property Management Rockstar who is fast, efficient, and tech-savvy?



We are an established, San Francisco Bay Area-based property management firm with nearly 8 years of success in the Short-Term Rental (STR/Airbnb/VRBO) and Long-Term Rental (LTR) industry. We have built a reputation for excellence, and we are looking for a seasoned professional to join our stable, high-performing team.



We don’t just need "customer service"—we need an Airbnb & Property Management Expert who understands the mechanics of the industry, moves quickly, and never lets a detail slip through the cracks.



Why Join Us?

Proven Stability: Work for a company with an 8-year track record in Airbnb and LTR management.

High-Speed Environment: We value efficiency. If you are fast and productive, you will thrive here.

Professional Standards: We have clear processes in place—no "startup" guesswork.

100% Remote: Long-term, stable remote work from your home office.



The Requirements (Strict)

Please do not apply if you only have general Call Center/BPO experience. We require specific Airbnb and Property Management expertise.

Direct Experience: Minimum 2+ years managing Short-Term Rentals (Airbnb/VRBO) and Long-Term Rentals.

PMS Mastery: Advanced proficiency in OwnerRez is highly preferred. You should know how to navigate workflows, triggers, and guest communication within the platform.

Operational Speed: Fast-thinking, fast-typing (60+ WPM), and able to handle multiple guest issues simultaneously.



Tech Stack: Knowledge of AI tools (ChatGPT), Time Doctor, and dual-monitor setups.



Your Responsibilities

Airbnb & Guest Management: Manage inquiries, bookings, and high-stakes resolution cases across Airbnb, VRBO, and direct sites.

Property Oversight: Coordinate check-ins/outs, send lease agreements, and monitor security.

Logistics & Maintenance: Schedule cleaning teams and review quality assurance photos.

Listing Optimization: Maintain and optimize Airbnb listings to ensure maximum occupancy and 5-star reviews.



Compensation & Benefits

Base Pay: Starting at $5/hour (Negotiable for extensive experience).

Schedule: Pacific Standard Time (PST) | Includes Weekends

Paid Leave: Accrued leave credits after 1 year.

Bonus: Performance-based bonuses.



How to Apply

To filter for the high-attention-to-detail candidates we need, please follow these steps exactly:



 your Resume to 
 Introduction: Record a brief intro highlighting your specific experience with OwnerRez, Airbnb, and STR/LTR management. (Share via Dropbox/Google Drive link).

Subject Line: Must be: [Property Management Specialist] – (Last Name, First Name)

Bonus: End your
 by telling us who the current Prime Minister of the United Kingdom is.

title: [URGENT] Guest Support Specialist – Direct Hire
description:
The Mission:

Join Luxostays, an established property management company with 8 years of industry expertise in the San Francisco Bay Area. We are not a hiring agency; you will be working directly for our internal team. We are seeking a high-caliber professional who thrives on operational precision, logic-based problem-solving, and the fast-paced nature of short-term rental (STR) management.



Why This Role?

Direct Engagement: Work directly with our leadership team (no middleman or agency).

Stability: Join a company with nearly a decade of success in the SF market.

High-Level Autonomy: We value "High D" personalities who can take command of a situation and drive resolutions without hand-holding.

Systems-Driven: We utilize a sophisticated tech stack (OwnerRez, VRBO, Slack, Time Doctor) for those who appreciate structured, efficient workflows.



The Schedule:

Full-Time (40 hours/week) | PST Timezone.

Rotating shifts including weekends (Business-critical coverage).



Your Core Responsibilities:

Command & Control: Oversee guest reservations, handle complex Airbnb resolutions, and manage security monitoring (CCTV). You are our first line of defense and the final word in guest satisfaction.

Logistics Coordination: Manage the "ripple effect" of turnovers. You will schedule cleaners, verify quality via photo audits, and coordinate specialized vendors (contractors, handymen) directly.

Asset Optimization: Maintain listing integrity across platforms, conduct due diligence research, and execute special administrative projects with 100% accuracy.

What We Require (The High-Standard Filter):

Critical Thinking: You must be able to de-escalate "urgent" maintenance or guest issues using logic and a "High D" approach—firm, fair, and fast.

Technical Proficiency: 2–4+ years in Airbnb/STR Management is mandatory. You must be comfortable with Time Doctor and AI-driven workflows.

The Setup: Reliable high-speed internet, a quiet environment, and a dual-monitor setup for maximum multitasking efficiency.

Education: College Degree required.

Compensation & Growth:

Starting Rate: $5/hour (Negotiable based on proven expertise in property operations).



Tiered Rewards: Skill-based pay increases, healthcare options, and year-end performance bonuses after 1 year of consistent excellence within our company.



How to Apply (Follow Precisely):

Failure to follow these instructions will result in immediate disqualification.

: 

Subject Line: [Guest Support Specialist] – (Last Name, First Name)

Attachments: Updated Resume + A Dropbox/Drive link to a 60-second audio intro explaining your specific experience in property management operations.

Compliance Test: At the end of your
, please answer this: Who is the current Prime Minister of London?

title: Remote Grant Writer (Manual Writing – No AI Tools)
description:
Help Fuel the Mission to Rebuild Communities With Equity at the Center

Parity Homes is seeking a passionate and detail-driven Remote Grant Writer to join our mission-aligned team. In this role, you will research funding opportunities, craft compelling proposals, and secure resources that directly support our work transforming long-abandoned Baltimore rowhomes into pathways to wealth, stability, and community resilience.

Our small but ambitious team values collaboration, transparency, and craftsmanship—not only in the homes we restore, but in the systems and partnerships we build. As part of a culture where every voice matters, your words will help shape the future of equitable housing investment.

Learn more about our mission in our TED Talk or visit us at 
.



Key Responsibilities

Research & Opportunity Identification

 • Conduct thorough research to identify grant opportunities aligned with Parity Homes’ mission and housing programs.

 • Stay informed on trends, best practices, and evolving strategies in the grant-funding landscape.



Proposal Development

 • Collaborate with organizational leaders and program staff to understand funding needs and strategic priorities.

 • Draft, edit, and prepare grant proposals, letters of intent, and supporting documents that clearly communicate our work, impact, and vision.

 • Ensure all submissions meet funder guidelines, requirements, and deadlines.



Submission & Follow-up

 • Manage the full grant submission process, ensuring timely and accurate application delivery.

 • Maintain organized records of all grant activities, submissions, and funder communications.

 • Follow up with funding agencies to track proposal progress and requests.

Grant Management & Reporting

 • Assist with the administration of awarded grants, ensuring compliance with all terms and reporting requirements.

 • Collaborate with finance and program teams to prepare financial statements, progress updates, and impact reports.



Relationship Building

 • Cultivate and maintain strong relationships with funders, partners, and potential donors.

 • Represent Parity Homes in meetings and communications with funding agencies.



Additional Responsibilities

 • Support strategic planning to align grant-seeking efforts with organizational goals.

 • Provide training and guidance to staff on grant-writing best practices.

 • Perform other duties as needed to advance the mission.



Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in English, Communications, Nonprofit Management, or a related field.

 • Proven experience as a grant writer with a track record of successful awards.

 • Exceptional written and verbal communication skills.

 • Strong research, analytical, and critical-thinking abilities.

 • High attention to detail and ability to meet tight deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

 • Proficiency with grant databases, online submission portals, and digital research tools.

 • Understanding of the nonprofit sector and funding ecosystem.



Preferred Attributes

 • Experience with grant administration and compliance reporting.

 • Ability to work both independently and collaboratively in a remote team setting.

 • Strong organizational and time-management skills.



Working Conditions

• Fully remote position with flexible working hours.

 • Reliable internet connection and a suitable home office environment required.



Performance Expectations

• Research at least 5 grant opportunities per week.

 • Prepare and submit 10 high-quality grant proposals per month.

 • Complete timely and accurate reporting for all active grants.



Join Us

If you are a strategic thinker with a love for storytelling, a commitment to accuracy, and a passion for expanding equitable housing solutions, we would love to hear from you. Apply today and help us secure the resources needed to build stronger, more resilient communities—one proposal at a time.

title: Graphic Artist

Someone who takes pride in visual quality.

title: VoiceOver Artist For YouTube Documentary
description:

Requirements:

title: Welcome to K-POP Universe: Office Admin Role (Entry-Level) for E-Commerce – Join the Beat!
description:
- Recruitment validity period: Until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement

- A PH VA team of more than 5 people has already been formed, and business collaboration is possible using Tagalog in a comfortable atmosphere.

- Providing educational tutorial videos and operating a mentorship program to help new comers quickly adapt



[About Us]

* Company Introduction (Video):

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

Just Fill out 10 Simple Questions through Google Form






Interview via google meet will be conducted after first screening and candidates will be notifed to their
s or
 



Thank you



Human Resource Dept.

Summitree

title: Brand Manager – MercadoLibre (Mexico & Brazil)
description:
Brand Manager – MercadoLibre (Mexico & Brazil)

Pet N Pet | Global Marketplace Expansion



Pet N Pet is expanding globally. We are building our presence on MercadoLibre Mexico and Brazil as the first step in a broader international growth strategy. This is not a maintenance role. This is a launch mission with a strong sales focus.

Pet N Pet is a pet waste management and supplies brand committed to building smarter, more responsible products for modern pet owners. This includes dogs, cats, litter, and other pet categories. We are now seeking a MercadoLibre Brand Manager to lead our marketplace expansion in Latin America.



Reporting Structure

- This role reports directly to the CEO and the Online Sales Team Lead.



Role Overview

This position will own the launch, growth, and strategic direction of Pet N Pet on MercadoLibre Mexico and Brazil. While brand awareness and category positioning are important, the goal is a quick launch with early sales and profitability, aiming for top 3 in the category as soon as possible. You will lead marketplace execution while collaborating with:

- Dedicated Marketing Department (graphics and video production)

- Gen VA Team supporting backend operations and execution

- Inventory Planning Team coordinating directly with suppliers



Key Responsibilities

- Lead marketplace launch strategy for Mexico and Brazil with a fast-track approach

- Develop and execute MercadoLibre Ads campaigns focused on visibility and sales growth

- Oversee listing optimization and brand positioning across all pet categories

- Direct creative asset needs to the Marketing Department

- Delegate operational tasks to Gen VA Team

- Collaborate with Inventory Planning to align stock with growth strategy

- Conduct competitor research and category analysis

- Identify product gaps and support research and development initiatives

- Deliver structured weekly performance and growth reports



Qualifications:

- Minimum 2+ years experience managing MercadoLibre accounts

- Hands-on experience with MercadoLibre Ads

- Experience launching or scaling brands on marketplaces

- Strong analytical and strategic thinking skills

- Experience conducting market and competitor research

- Spanish and Portuguese fluency preferred but not required



This role is ideal for a marketplace leader who wants to build territory, create brand presence, drive fast growth, and ensure early profitability.

title: USA TikTok Product Researcher (Low-Competition Winning Products)
description:
We are looking for a skilled and reliable product researcher to help us find winning dropshipping products for the USA 
 and
 market.

Using

 Ad Library and Other Spy Tools.



Checking ad longevity (minimum 7+ days running)

Suggesting creative angles and positioning

We want data-backed research with clear validation.

Problem-solving or emotional products



Early-scaling or emerging products in the USA

USA WINNER

Share your portfolio or past research samples (Google Drive or screenshots)



Note - Extra Bonus per winning product.

title: E-commerce Operations & Store Manager
description:
Remote / Full-Time



E-commerce / Dropshipping / Store set up / Shopify /  Operations / Visuals / creatives 



-



About the Role



We are a fast-growing e-commerce brand looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented E-commerce Operations & Store Manager to take ownership of our online stores.



You will be responsible for maintaining, optimizing, and scaling our Shopify infrastructure, ensuring smooth operations across product listings, themes set-up + Optimisation, and backend systems.



This is not a VA role.

This is a core operational position.



-



Key Responsibilities

 • Set up and manage Shopify stores

 • Upload and optimize product listings (titles, descriptions, variants, SEO)

 • Configure themes and customize layouts

 • Manage apps and integrations

 • Optimize site speed and performance

 • Implement CRO improvements

 • Maintain clean backend structure (collections, tags, metafields)

 • Monitor store functionality and fix bugs

 • Coordinate with marketing & creative teams for launches

 • Ensure promotions and bundles function properly

 • Manage product inventory and availability



-



Ideal Candidate

 • Strong Shopify experience (1–3+ years preferred)

 • Highly detail-oriented

 • Process-driven and organized

 • Comfortable working independently

 • Analytical mindset

 • Strong problem-solving ability

 • Able to follow structured systems

 • Understands basic CRO principles

 • Familiar with page builders (e.g., Shrine, Dawn, etc.)

 • Bonus: Liquid knowledge



-



You Might Be a Great Fit If:

 • You enjoy systems and structure

 • You like making things cleaner and more efficient

 • You catch mistakes others miss

 • You prefer execution over “talking about ideas”

 • You care about precision



-



What We Offer

 • Long-term position in a scaling brand

 • Growth opportunities

 • Performance-based bonuses

 • Direct impact on company performance

 • Autonomy & ownership

• Rebuild product pages inside Replo or similar AI tools

title: Strategic Partnership Manager (Australia/NZ Market)
description:
Strategic Partnership Manager (Australia/NZ Market)



Remote – Philippines | Full-Time (40 hours per week)



Up to US$1600 per month (DOE) + Uncapped Commission 



CDM Direct, a leading provider of outsourced bookkeeping and financial operations support, is seeking a high-calibre sales professional to join our international expansion team. This is not a call centre role — this is a strategic, consultative sales position working directly with Australian leadership.



We are recruiting Tier 1 B2B talent capable of engaging Business Owners, CFOs, Finance Managers, Partners, and senior decision-makers across Australia and New Zealand.



About the Role



As the Strategic Partnership Manager, you will lead outreach to qualified businesses, identify financial pain points, and secure discovery meetings with senior sales executives. You will act as a market expansion lead, responsible for driving our growth in Australia/NZ with a roadmap into the UK, Canada, and USA.



This role requires consultative selling, commercial acumen, and the ability to speak confidently about financial benefits, operational efficiencies, and outsourced bookkeeping solutions.



Key Responsibilities



• Conduct targeted, high-quality outreach to senior business decision-makers.

• Lead commercial conversations that identify real business needs and opportunities.

• Position CDM Direct’s outsourced bookkeeping services with clarity and credibility.

• Secure qualified meetings for senior sales executives.

• Maintain accurate CRM records and meet weekly/monthly KPIs.

• Demonstrate strategic thinking, professionalism, and strong communication in every interaction.



Who We Are Looking For



We are targeting candidates with backgrounds such as:



• B2B sales professionals from high-end Knowledge Process Outsourcing (KPO) firms.

• Experienced Account Executives or Business Development professionals.

• Accounting or Finance graduates with strong communication skills who want to transition into consultative sales.

• Professionals capable of discussing P&L impact, operational efficiency, and financial workflows.



You Will Succeed in This Role If You Have



• Minimum 2+ years tenure in a B2B role.

• Strong experience selling professional services, SaaS (Software as a Service) solutions, or financial/technical services.

• Excellent English communication with a polished professional presence.

• The ability to lead unscripted, strategic conversations.

• Strong resilience, discipline, and self-management in a remote work environment.

• A stable, private home office with reliable high-speed internet.



We Are Not Looking For



• Entry-level call Centre agents

• Scripted telemarketers

• Candidates with short tenure or high attrition history



Compensation



• Up to US$1600 per month: For candidates with proven success in consultative B2B sales. 

• Uncapped commissions available after a structured 6-month training and performance period. 



Why Join Us?



• Work directly with Australian executives — not a call Centre environment.

• Be part of an international expansion strategy with global career pathways.

• Receive structured training in financial services, SaaS sales, and bookkeeping operations.

• Permanent full-time remote role (40 hours per week).

• High autonomy with global impact on company growth.



How to Apply



Please send the following:



1. Your CV

2. Your LinkedIn profile link

title: Remote Finance & Payroll Accountant
description:
Headline: Remote Finance & Payroll Accountant | PHP 85,000/mo + Day 1 HMO (Employee + 1) | Full Training Provided



The Opportunity: Are you an accounting professional who excels at management accounting and meticulous payroll processing? We are looking for an experienced Accounts & Payroll Accountant to manage the financial operations for our Fiji division.

Reporting directly to our Group CFO in New Zealand, this is a fully remote, long-term contracting role. You will handle daily bank reconciliations, premise-based payroll, and comprehensive month-end reporting.



Never worked with Fiji tax or payroll before? We understand that Fiji compliance is highly specific. We will provide complete, step-by-step training on all local tax laws, superannuation (FNPF) and our premise-based systems. You bring the core accounting talent and we will teach you the rest.



Remuneration & Benefits:

• Base Pay: PHP 85,000 per month flat rate.

• Healthcare (HMO): Premium health coverage for the contractor and one dependent from Day 1.

• Bonus: Standard 13th-month pay.

• Paid Leave: 10 days of paid annual leave per year (available after your first 12 months of continuous service).

• Schedule: ANZ business hours shifts, offering an excellent work-life balance.

• Work Environment: 100% remote. This is a Bring Your Own Device (BYOD) role requiring a reliable computer and high-speed internet connection.



Key Responsibilities:

• Managing daily transactions: Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable and daily bank reconciliations.

• Processing premise-based payroll accurately (full training provided).

• Handling local Fiji compliance: FNPF contributions and FRCS (PAYE/VAT) reporting.

• Owning the month-end close process and delivering accurate P&L and Balance Sheet reports to the New Zealand leadership team.



Requirements:

• A University Degree in Accountancy, Finance, or a related field (CA/CPA is highly advantageous).

• 3 to 5 years of hands-on accounting, month-end, and payroll experience.

• High attention to detail, particularly regarding premise-based payroll systems.

• Ability to work independently and communicate effectively with remote leadership.



Ready to join our team and upskill with direct training from our NZ leadership? Apply now to discuss the role further.

title: Sales Representative
description:
About the Role



We’re looking for motivated sales professionals to join our team and help grow our international business. You’ll be handling customer inquiries, closing deals, maintaining relationships, and exploring new opportunities—all while working with a steady stream of leads provided by the company.



Key Responsibilities



1. Follow up on inquiries and close deals

Respond promptly to customer inquiries from our internal channels. Communicate via
 and phone to understand customer needs, provide quotes, product details, and customized solutions, and turn inquiries into confirmed orders.

We provide a steady flow of customer leads.

2. Recommend new and related products

Introduce new products, upgrades, or other items customers may be interested in. Look for opportunities to generate additional orders from existing accounts.

3. Customer follow-up and relationship management

Maintain long-term relationships with current customers. Regularly check in to understand needs and drive repeat business.

4. Identify and develop potential customers

Spot new business opportunities, such as related companies of current clients or promising leads, and actively pursue them.

5. Customer information management

Keep accurate records of communications, customer intentions, and order progress. Report updates to your supervisor as required.

6. Market and customer feedback

Collect customer feedback and market insights, and share them with the team to help improve products and inform strategy.



Requirements



-Minimum 2 years of relevant experience in international or export sales

-Fluent English (written and spoken), able to communicate smoothly with U.S. and European clients

-Strong customer development skills; proactive in identifying new opportunities (large-scale market expansion not required)

-Experienced in order negotiation and closing deals

-Skilled in customer follow-up and relationship maintenance

description:

Targets

20 plus new DM conversations per week

3 to 5 booked calls per week via qualified handoffs to the founder

Comment daily using our 3 tier comment framework

Start and manage DMs using our DM templates

Qualify and hand off only when ready to book or needs founder input

Repurpose content to other platforms using scheduling tools later, once LinkedIn is stable

Daily KPI reporting in a simple sheet

No pricing in DMs

Post quality is pass fail. No posting unless it passes our checklist

You must follow instructions and hit deadlines without reminders

Strong written English

2 LinkedIn posts

10 comments

10 personalised DM openers

2 LinkedIn posts

10 comments

10 personalised DM openers

1 two proof links or screenshots of posts you wrote or accounts you managed

3 confirm you can do the paid test within 24 hours
salary: $200 to $400 per month or $4 to $6 per h

title: Amazon Flat File & Bulk Listing Specialist
description:
Amazon Flat File & Bulk Listing Specialist



Full-Time | 40 Hours Per Week | Long-Term Position



About the Role



We are hiring an experienced Amazon listings specialist with strong flat file and bulk upload experience.



This is not an entry-level VA role. We manage 12,000+ Amazon listings with hundreds of variations. We need someone who understands catalog structure, parent/child relationships, and bulk listing management at scale.



You must be comfortable working inside Seller Central daily and solving complex listing issues independently.



Core Responsibilities

1. Flat File & Bulk Listing Management



Create and update listings using Amazon flat files



Build and manage parent/child variation families



Perform safe bulk edits without damaging live listings



Diagnose and fix upload errors, suppression issues, and attribute conflicts



2. Large-Scale Product Expansion



We currently have:



150+ core products



150+ fabrics



Thousands of possible variation combinations



Your role will be to:



Systematically expand product variations



Build efficient bulk workflows



Eliminate manual copy-paste processes



Maintain clean and scalable catalog structure



3. Image & A+ Content Updates (12,000+ Listings)



Improve main and gallery images in bulk



Update A+ content efficiently



Maintain brand consistency across variations



Reduce manual labor through structured processes



4. Catalog Health & Accuracy



Audit listings regularly



Monitor compliance warnings and suppressed listings



Maintain accurate attributes, pricing, and variation integrity



Prevent mismatched SKUs and broken parent-child structures



Required Experience



Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience with Amazon Seller Central



Strong experience using Amazon flat files



Experience managing large catalogs (1,000+ SKUs minimum)



Advanced Excel skills (formulas, filters, validation checks)



Deep understanding of variation relationships



Ability to troubleshoot and resolve listing errors independently



Preferred Experience



Walmart Seller Center



A+ Content management



Workflow automation experience



Using AI tools (ChatGPT) to assist with listing improvements



40 hours per week



Long-term, stable role



Key Performance Indicators



Listing accuracy across the catalog



Speed and efficiency of bulk updates



Minimal upload errors or suppression issues



Successful expansion of product variations



Improved listing consistency and quality



Application Instructions (Important)



To be considered:



Respond to this job post with your resume or CV attached.



Briefly explain your experience with Amazon flat files.



Describe how you would expand 150 products across 150 fabrics without manual copy-paste work.



Confirm you are open to completing a paid test project.



Only applicants who follow all instructions will be reviewed.

title: Social Media Marketing Specialist
description:
About me:

I’m an acupuncturist and Chinese medicine educator passionate about bringing this ancient, holistic wisdom into modern life. I own an acupuncture brick and mortar clinic. 



I also have a podcast and am creating a digital course through a separate LLC. Through that business, I teach parents and wellness enthusiasts how to use Chinese medicine for themselves and their families at home.



About the Role:

I’m looking for a creative, super organized, proactive Virtual Assistant with strong marketing instincts to help me grow my audience and refine my digital presence for both businesses. This role blends content creation, social media management,
 marketing support, and podcast editing — perfect for someone who loves blending strategy and creativity in the wellness space.



What You’ll Do:

Manage and grow my social media following (Instagram,
, Tiktok)

Plan, create, and schedule engaging social media content

Edit occasional podcast audio

Manage and grow my
 list (Mailchimp)

Track analytics and identify what’s resonating with the audience

Collaborate on marketing campaigns, launches, and community growth ideas

Use Canva or similar tools for on-brand visuals



You’re a Great Fit If You:

Speak good English

Have good internet connection

Have 2+ years experience in social media or marketing support for wellness, coaching, or lifestyle brands

Are organized and a great self-starter

Write clear, compelling copy and have an eye for clean, aesthetic design

Stay on top of digital trends and understand organic growth strategies

Are detail-oriented, organized, and can work independently

Have an interest in holistic health 



Hours & Compensation:

Part-time, 5–10 hours per week to start (with much room to grow! The more you can help my following grow, the more content I can create and the more help I will need!)



Competitive hourly rate based on experience



To Apply Please send:



A brief intro about yourself and your experience and how you would be able to help my companies in particular

Examples of social media content or campaigns you’ve managed

Your hourly rate and availability

Your WhatsApp Number 

Something that inspires you and why. Could be a quote, food, person, movie, animal, etc. ? 

Thank you for your time and consideration!

title: Recruitment Consultant
description:
About the Role

We are looking for an experienced Recruitment Consultant who has previously worked within UK recruitment agencies and understands the full recruitment lifecycle. This role will focus heavily on client onboarding, relationship management, and service delivery, ensuring clients receive a high-quality recruitment experience.



Key Responsibilities

• Onboard new clients, including needs analysis and service agreements

• Build and maintain strong client relationships

• Manage client accounts and act as the main point of contact

• Understand hiring requirements and develop recruitment strategies

• Coordinate with internal recruiters and resourcing teams

• Ensure compliance with UK recruitment standards and processes

• Provide regular updates, reports, and performance reviews to clients

• Support business development activities where required



Requirements

• Proven experience working within a UK recruitment agency

• Strong knowledge of the UK recruitment process and compliance

• Experience with client onboarding and account management

• Excellent communication and relationship-building skills

• Ability to manage multiple clients and priorities

• Familiarity with ATS/CRM systems

• Self-motivated and able to work independently



Desirable

• Experience in education, healthcare, or professional services recruitment

• Business development experience

• Understanding of safeguarding and compliance processes



What We Offer

• Flexible working arrangements

• Opportunity to grow within a scaling organisation

• Supportive team environment

• Competitive pay and performance incentives



How to Apply:

Please send your CV and a short summary of your recruitment experience, including the sectors you have worked in.



Location: Remote / Hybrid

Job Type: Full-time / Part-time (Flexible)

Salary: Competitive, dependent on experience
